{"timestamp":"2026-05-17T11:52:18.444Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"c4217472-c7fa-491c-9e83-d980e17bca43","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\c4217472-c7fa-491c-9e83-d980e17bca43.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"# JavaScript Stars Animation Skill ‘«Ų Lab-4 Advanced JS Animation\n\n**Svrha**: Generirati `stars-animation.js` datoteku s animacijom zvijezda/to¶Źkica koje prate mi+Ū prema Lab4.md zahtjevima za napredno kori+Ūtenje JavaScripta i animacije u slu+Ņbi aplikacije.\n\n## Output ‘«Ų `wwwroot/js/stars-animation.js`\n\n```javascript\n/**\n * Stars Animation ‘«Ų Zvijezde/to¶Źkice koje prate mi+Ū\n * Parametri se mogu podesiti na po¶Źetku datoteke\n */\n\n(function () {\n    'use strict';\n\n    // ========== KONFIGURACIJA ==========\n    const CONFIG = {\n        STAR_COUNT: 300,              // Broj zvijezda (3x vi+Ūe od baseline)\n        STAR_SIZE: 2,                 // Veli¶Źina to¶Źkice u pikselima\n        MIN_SPEED: 0.5,               // Minimalna brzina (px/frame)\n        MAX_SPEED: 3,                 // Maksimalna brzina\n        ROGUE_STAR_COUNT: 7,          // Broj zvijezda koje se ne prate mi+Ūem (5-10)\n        EASE_FACTOR: 0.1,             // Faktor za glatko skaliranje brzine\n        ANIMATION_FRAME_RATE: 60      // FPS\n    };\n\n    // ========== INICIJALIZACIJA ==========\n\n    class StarsAnimation {\n        constructor() {\n            this.stars = [];\n            this.mouseX = window.innerWidth / 2;\n            this.mouseY = window.innerHeight / 2;\n            this.animationId = null;\n            this.isRunning = false;\n\n            this.init();\n        }\n\n        init() {\n            // Kreiraj canvas element\n            this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n            this.canvas.id = 'stars-canvas';\n            this.canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n            this.canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n            this.canvas.style.cssText = `\n                position: fixed;\n                top: 0;\n                left: 0;\n                width: 100%;\n                height: 100%;\n                z-index: -1;\n                pointer-events: none;\n                background: transparent;\n            `;\n\n            document.body.insertBefore(this.canvas, document.body.firstChild);\n            this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d');\n\n            // Generiraj zvijezde\n            this.generateStars();\n\n            // Eventlisener za mi+Ū\n            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n            window.addEventListener('resize', () => this.handleResize());\n\n            // Zapo¶Źni animaciju\n            this.start();\n        }\n\n        generateStars() {\n            this.stars = [];\n\n            for (let i = 0; i < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT; i++) {\n                const isRogue = i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT;\n                const star = {\n                    x: Math.random() * window.innerWidth,\n                    y: Math.random() * window.innerHeight,\n                    size: CONFIG.STAR_SIZE,\n                    baseSpeed: isRogue ? \n                        (Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED) + CONFIG.MIN_SPEED) : \n                        CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n                    currentSpeed: CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n                    isRogue: isRogue,\n                    opacity: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5 // 0.5 do 1\n                };\n                this.stars.push(star);\n            }\n        }\n\n        handleMouseMove(e) {\n            this.mouseX = e.clientX;\n            this.mouseY = e.clientY;\n        }\n\n        handleResize() {\n            this.canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n            this.canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n        }\n\n        calculateSpeed(star) {\n            // Ako je rogue zvijezda, koristi vlastitu brzinu\n            if (star.isRogue) {\n                star.currentSpeed = star.baseSpeed;\n                return;\n            }\n\n            // Izra¶Źunaj udaljenost mi+Ūa od centra ekrana\n            const centerX = window.innerWidth / 2;\n            const centerY = window.innerHeight / 2;\n\n            const distX = Math.abs(this.mouseX - centerX);\n            const distY = Math.abs(this.mouseY - centerY);\n\n            const maxDist = Math.sqrt(centerX * centerX + centerY * centerY);\n            const dist = Math.sqrt(distX * distX + distY * distY);\n\n            // Normaliziraj udaljenost (0 = centar, 1 = rub)\n            const normalized = Math.min(dist / maxDist, 1);\n\n            // Mapira u raspon brzina (inverzno: bli+Ņe centar = sporije)\n            const targetSpeed = CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + (1 - normalized) * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n\n            // Glatko skaliranje brzine\n            star.currentSpeed += (targetSpeed - star.currentSpeed) * CONFIG.EASE_FACTOR;\n        }\n\n        update() {\n            for (let star of this.stars) {\n                this.calculateSpeed(star);\n\n                // Izra¶Źunaj smjer od mi+Ūa\n                const angle = Math.atan2(star.y - this.mouseY, star.x - this.mouseX);\n\n                // Pomakni zvijezdu prema mi+Ū poziciji\n                star.x += Math.cos(angle) * star.currentSpeed;\n                star.y += Math.sin(angle) * star.currentSpeed;\n\n                // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n                if (star.x < -10 || star.x > window.innerWidth + 10 ||\n                    star.y < -10 || star.y > window.innerHeight + 10) {\n                    this.regenerateStar(star);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        regenerateStar(star) {\n            // Nasumi¶Źno odaberi stranu s koje ¶Áe zvijezda do¶Ái\n            const side = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);\n\n            switch (side) {\n                case 0: // Od lijevog ruba\n                    star.x = -10;\n                    star.y = Math.random() * window.innerHeight;\n                    break;\n                case 1: // Od desnog ruba\n                    star.x = window.innerWidth + 10;\n                    star.y = Math.random() * window.innerHeight;\n                    break;\n                case 2: // Od vrha\n                    star.x = Math.random() * window.innerWidth;\n                    star.y = -10;\n                    break;\n                case 3: // Od dna\n                    star.x = Math.random() * window.innerWidth;\n                    star.y = window.innerHeight + 10;\n                    break;\n            }\n        }\n\n        draw() {\n            // O¶Źisti canvas\n            this.ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)';\n            this.ctx.clearRect(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);\n\n            // Crtaj zvijezde\n            for (let star of this.stars) {\n                this.ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${star.opacity})`;\n                this.ctx.fillRect(\n                    star.x - star.size / 2,\n                    star.y - star.size / 2,\n                    star.size,\n                    star.size\n                );\n\n                // Opciono: glow efekt za rogue zvijezde\n                if (star.isRogue) {\n                    this.ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${star.opacity * 0.5})`;\n                    this.ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n                    this.ctx.beginPath();\n                    this.ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, star.size * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n                    this.ctx.stroke();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        animate() {\n            this.update();\n            this.draw();\n\n            if (this.isRunning) {\n                this.animationId = requestAnimationFrame(() => this.animate());\n            }\n        }\n\n        start() {\n            if (!this.isRunning) {\n                this.isRunning = true;\n                this.animate();\n            }\n        }\n\n        stop() {\n            this.isRunning = false;\n            if (this.animationId) {\n                cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationId);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Javna metoda za dinami¶Źko pode+Ūavanje konfiguracije\n        updateConfig(newConfig) {\n            Object.assign(CONFIG, newConfig);\n            this.generateStars();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ========== INICIJALIZACIJA JAVASCRIPT-A ==========\n\n    // Inicijaliziraj nakon +Ūto je DOM u¶Źitan\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n        window.starsAnimation = new StarsAnimation();\n    });\n\n    // Ako je DOM ve¶Á u¶Źitan (npr. u async skripti)\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n            if (!window.starsAnimation) {\n                window.starsAnimation = new StarsAnimation();\n            }\n        });\n    } else {\n        window.starsAnimation = new StarsAnimation();\n    }\n\n})();\n```\n\n## Output ‘«Ų Inclusion u `_Layout.cshtml`\n\nTrebam dodati nakon svih ostalih skripti:\n\n```html\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"hr\">\n<head>\n    <!-- ... ostatak head ... -->\n</head>\n<body>\n    <!-- ... ostatak body ... -->\n\n    <!-- Zvijezde animacija ‘«Ų trebam biti na kraju -->\n    <script src=\"~/js/stars-animation.js\" asp-append-version=\"true\"></script>\n\n    @RenderSection(\"Scripts\", required: false)\n</body>\n</html>\n```\n\n## Dinami¶Źko Pode+Ūavanje Konfiguracije (Opciono)\n\nAko trebam pode+Ūavati konfiguraciju tijekom razvoja, mogu u console-u:\n\n```javascript\n// U konsoli preglednika:\nwindow.starsAnimation.updateConfig({\n    STAR_COUNT: 500,      // Pove¶Áaj broj zvijezda\n    MAX_SPEED: 5,         // Pove¶Áaj maksimalnu brzinu\n    ROGUE_STAR_COUNT: 10  // Pove¶Áaj broj roguezvijezda\n});\n```\n\n## CSS (Opciono ‘«Ų ako trebam dodatne stilove)\n\nAko je potreban `wwwroot/css/stars.css`:\n\n```css\n/* Stars Animation Styles */\n\n#stars-canvas {\n    background: 1;\n    }\n    100% {\n        opacity: 0.5;\n    }\n}\n\n/* Opciono: ako trebam animirati background */\nbody {\n    transition: background 0.3s ease;\n}\n```\n\n## Karakteristike\n\n1. ‘Ěý **300+ zvijezda** ‘«Ų Inicijalno 300, mogu se dinami¶Źki mijenjati\n2. ‘Ěý **Dinami¶Źka brzina** ‘«Ų Skalira se s pozicijom mi+Ūa (0.5-3 px/frame)\n3. ‘Ěý **Logika brzine** ‘«Ų Mi+Ū u sredini = sporije, mi+Ū na rubovima = br+Ņe\n4. ‘Ěý **Rogue zvijezde** ‘«Ų 7 zvijezda (5-10) koje ne prate mi+Ū\n5. ‘Ěý **Glatko skaliranje** ‘«Ų Koristi EASE_FACTOR za smooth transitions\n6. ‘Ěý **Regeneracija** ‘«Ų        const parts = dateStr.split('.');\n                    if (parts.length !== 3) return null;\n                    \n                    const day = parseInt(parts[0]);\n                    const month = parseInt(parts[1]);\n                    const year = parseInt(parts[2]);\n                    \n                    return new Date(year, month - 1, day);\n                } else {\n                    // MM/dd/yyyy format\n                    const parts = dateStr.split('/');\n                    if (parts.length !== 3) return null;\n                    \n                    const month = [];\nlet mouse = { x: 0, y: 0 };\nlet rogueIndices = new Set();\n\nfunction initStars() {\n    canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.id = 'stars-canvas';\n    canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n    \n    canvas.style.cssText = `\n        position: fixed;\n        top: 0;\n        left: 0;\n        z-index: -1;\n        pointer-events: none;\n    `;\n    \n    document.body.insertBefore(canvas, document.body.firstChild);\n    ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    \n    // Kreiraj zvijezde\n    for (let i = 0; i < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT; i++) {\n        stars.push({\n            x: Math.random() * canvas.width,\n            y: Math.random() * canvas.height,\n            speed: calculateSpeed(i),\n            isRogue: i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT\n        });\n        \n        if (i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT) {\n            rogueIndices.add(i);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Track mi+Ūu\n    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        mouse.x = e.clientX;\n        mouse.y = e.clientY;\n    });\n    \n    // Resize event\n    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {\n        canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n        canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n    });\n    \n    animate();\n}\n\nfunction calculateSpeed(index) {\n    if (index < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT) {\n        return CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n    }\n    \n    // Za normalne zvijezde: brzina zavisi od mi+Ūa\n    const centerX = canvas.width / 2;\n    const centerY = canvas.height / 2;\n    const distFromCenter = Math.hypot(mouse.x - centerX, mouse.y - centerY);\n    const maxDist = Math.hypot(centerX, centerY);\n    const normalizedDist = Math.min(distFromCenter / maxDist, 1);\n    \n    // +Što je mi+Ū bli+Ņe centru = sporija brzina\n    return CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + (1 - normalizedDist) * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n}\n\nfunction animate() {\n    // O¶Źisti canvas\n    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    \n    // A+Ņuriranje i star.speed = calculateSpeed(index);\n        }\n        \n        // Izra¶Źunaj smjer prema mi+Ūi\n        const dx = mouse.x - star.x;\n        const dy = mouse.y - star.y;\n        const distance = Math.hypot(dx, dy);\n        \n        if (distance > 0) {\n            const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\n            star.x += Math.cos(angle) * star.speed;\n            star.y += Math.sin(angle) * star.speed;\n        }\n        \n        // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n        regenerateOffscreenStar(star);\n        \n        // Iscrtaj zvijezdu\n        ctx.beginPath();\n        ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, CONFIG.STAR_SIZE, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n        ctx.fill();\n    });\n    \n    requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}\n\nfunction regenerateOffscreenStar(star) {\n    const padding = 10;\n    \n    if (star.x < -padding || star.x > canvas.width + padding ||\n        star.y < -padding || star.y > canvas.height + padding) {\n        \n        // Odlu¶Źi gdje ¶Áe se pojaviti novi zvijezda\n        if (Math.random() < 0.5) {\n            // X je izvan\n            star.x = Math.random() < 0.5 ? -padding : canvas.width + padding;\n            star.y = Math.random() * canvas.height;\n        } else {\n            // Y je izvan\n            star.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;\n            star.y = Math.random() < 0.5 ? -padding : canvas.height + padding;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// Inicijalizacija kad je DOM spreman\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initStars);\n} else {\n i < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT; i++) {\n        const star = createStarFromEdge(i);\n        stars.push(star);\n\n        if (i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT) {\n            rogueIndices.add(i);\n            rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2; // Random smjer\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Track mi+Ūu\n    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        mouse.x = e.clientX;\n        mouse.y = e.clientY;\n    });\n\n    // Resize event\n    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {\n        canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n        canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n    });\n\n    animate();\n}\n\nfunction createStarFromEdge(index) {\n    let x, y;\n    const isRogue = index < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT;\n\n    // Odaberi random rub\n    const edge = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);\n    if (edge === 0) {\n        // Gornji rub\n        x = Math.random() * canvas.width;\n        y = -10;\n    } else if (edge === 1) {\n        // Donji rub\n        x = Math.random() * canvas.width;\n        y = canvas.height + 10;\n    } else if (edge === 2) {\n        // Lijevi rub\n        x = -10;\n        y = Math.random() * canvas.height;\n    } else {\n        // Desni rub\n        x = canvas.width + 10;\n        y = Math.random() * canvas.height;\n    }\n\n    return {\n        x: x,\n        y: y,\n        speed: isRogue ? (CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED)) : CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n        isRogue: isRogue,\n        angle: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2 // Za random movement\n    };\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CrtM3r1MTM9DxG7DhJPE3Z__vscode-1779016408136","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

(CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED)) : CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n        isRogue: isRogue,\n        angle: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2 // Za random movement\n    };\n}\n\nfunction animate() {\n    // O¶Źisti canvas\n    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    // Kontinuirano dodaj nove zvijezde s rubova\n    spawnCounter++;\n    if (spawnCounter % 10 === 0 && stars.length < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT * 1.5) {\n        // Svakih 10 framesa dodaj novu zvijezdu s ruba\n        const newStar = createStarFromEdge(stars.length);\n        stars.push(newStar);\n    }\n\n    // A+Ņuriranje i iscrtavanje zvijezda\n    ctx.fillStyle = CONFIG.COLOR;\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < stars.length; i++) {\n        const star = stars[i];\n\n        if (star.isRogue) {\n            // ROGUE ZVIJEZDE: Samo random gibanje, bez ovisnosti o mi+Ūu\n            // Promijeni smjer povremeno\n            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {\n                rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n            }\n\n            star.x += Math.cos(rogueAngle[i]) * star.speed;\n            star.y += Math.sin(rogueAngle[i]) * star.speed;\n        } else {\n            // NORMALNE ZVIJEZDE: Gibanje prema mi+Ūu\n            const dx = mouse.x - star.x;\n            const dy = mouse.y - star.y;\n            const distance = Math.hypot(dx, dy);\n\n            if (distance > 0) {\n                const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\n                // Brzina zavisi od distance mi+Ūu\n                const distanceFactor = Math.min(distance / 500, 1);\n                const speed = CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + distanceFactor * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n                star.x += Math.cos(angle) * speed;\n                star.y += Math.sin(angle) * speed;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n        if (star.x < -20 || star.x > canvas.width + 20 ||\n            star.y < -20 || star.y > canvas.height + 20) {\n            // Zamijeni sa novom zvijezdom s ruba\n            stars[i] = createStarFromEdge(i);\n            if (star.isRogue && rogueAngle[i]) {\n                rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n            }\n        } else {\n            // Iscrtaj zvijezdu\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, CONFIG.STAR_SIZE, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // O¶Źisti stare rogue angles ako je array smanjen\n    if (stars.length < Object.keys(rogueAngle).length) {\n        Object.keys(rogueAngle).forEach(key => {\n            if (key >= stars.length) {\n                delete rogueAngle[key];\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_019DQdym56hDV4oPQM6VuL5s__vscode-1779016408146","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

star.x;\n            const dy = mouse.y - star.y;\n            const distance = Math.hypot(dx, dy);\n\n            if (distance > 0) {\n                const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\n                // Brzina zavisi od distance mi+Ūu\n                const distanceFactor = Math.min(distance / 500, 1);\n                const speed = CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + distanceFactor * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n                star.x += Math.cos(angle) * speed;\n                star.y += Math.sin(angle) * speed;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n        if (star.x < -20 || star.x > canvas.width + 20 ||\n            star.y < -20 || star.y > canvas.height + 20) {\n            // Zamijeni sa novom zvijezdom s ruba\n            stars[i] = createStarFromEdge(i);\n            if (star.isRogue && rogueAngle[i]) {\n                rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n            }\n        } else {\n            // Iscrtaj zvijezdu\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, CONFIG.STAR_SIZE, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // O¶Źisti stare rogue angles ako je array smanjen\n    if (stars.length < Object.keys(rogueAngle).length) {\n        Object.keys(rogueAngle).forEach(key => {\n            if (key >= stars.length) {\n                delete rogueAngle[key];\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01QrbXx4K6iDFHnVJjtFiumR__vscode-1779112000546","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

Identi¶Źna AJAX Delete Logika u Index Viewima\n**Problemi:**\n- AuthorsIndex, BooksIndex, GenresIndex, PublishersIndex, UsersIndex, ReviewsIndex\n- Svi imaju isti JavaScript:\n  ```javascript\n  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n      if (e.target.classList.contains('btn-delete')) {\n          const id = e.target.dataset.id;\n          if (confirm('Jeste li sigurni...')) {\n              fetch(`/Controller/Delete/${id}`, {\n                  method: 'POST',\n                  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }\n              })\n              .then(response => response.json())\n              .then(data => {\n                  if (data.success) {\n                      row.style.opacity = '0';\n                      setTimeout(() => row.remove(), 300);\n                  } else {\n                      alert('Gre+Ūka: ' + data.message);\n                  }\n              })\n          }\n      }\n  });\n  ```\n\n**Preporuka:**\n- Kreiraj shared JavaScript datoteku `wwwroot/js/delete-handler.js` koja je DRY\n- Koristi data-attribute za dinami¶Źki endpoint: `data-delete-url=\"/Authors/Delete/{id}\"`\n- Koristi event delegation umjesto dupliciranja u svakom viewu\n\n### 4. Identi¶Źni PopulateDropdowns Kod\n**Problem:**\n- ReviewsController.PopulateDropdownsAsync():\n  ```csharp\n  ViewBag.Books = books.Select(b => new SelectListItem { ... }).ToList();\n  ViewBag.Users = users.Select(u => new SelectListItem { ... }).ToList();\n  ViewBag.Sentiments = Enum.GetValues(...).Cast<ReviewSentiment>().Select(...).ToList();\n  ```\n  \n- BooksController.PopulateDropdownsAsync():\n  ```csharp\n  ViewBag.Authors = authors.Select(a => new SelectListItem { ... }).ToList();\n  ViewBag.Publishers = publishers.Select(p => new SelectListItem { ... }).ToList();\n  ViewBag.Genres = genres.Select(g => new SelectListItem { ... }).ToList();\n  ViewBag.Statuses = Enum.GetValues(...).Cast<BookStatus>().Select(...).ToList();\n  ```\n\n**Preporuka:**\n- Kreiraj `IDropdownService` sa generi¶Źkom `PopulateDropdownAsync<T>` metodom\n- Ili kreiraj extension method na IRepository za konverziju u SelectListItem\n\n---\n\n## ≠ŤŤŪ NEDOSTAJE AJAX SEARCH NA INDEX STRANICAMA\n\n**Problem:** Lab4.md zahtjeva \"Svaka stranica koja prikazuje listu podataka treba imati AJAX pretragu\"\n\n**Trenutno stanje:**\n- Authors/Index - samo delete AJAX (nema search filtriranja)\n- Books/Index - samo delete AJAX (nema search filtriranja)\n- Genres/Index - samo delete AJAX (nema search filtriranja)\n- Publishers/Index - samo delete AJAX (nema search filtriranja)\n- Users/Index - samo delete AJAX (nema search filtriranja)\n- Reviews/Index - samo delete AJAX (nema search filtriranja)\n\n**Trebalo bi:** Dodaj search input polje na svakoj Index stranici koje koristi Search endpoint controllera\n\n---\n\n## ≠ŤŤů DOBRO - +ŠTA RADI KAKO TREBA\n\n### 1. Soft Delete\n- Dobro implementirano u svim repozitorijima (DeletedAt != null)\n- Svi GetAll/GetById filtriraju deleted podatke\n\n### 5. 1, day);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        function updateCombinedValue() {\n            const dateStr = $dateInput.val();\n            const timeStr = $timeInput.val();\n            \n            if (dateStr && timeStr) {\n                const dateObj = parseDate(dateStr, dateFormat);\n                \n                if (dateObj && !isNaN(dateObj.getTime())) {\n                    const [hours, minutes] = timeStr.split(':');\n                    dateObj.setHours(parseInt(hours) || 0, parseInt(minutes) || 0, 0);\n                    $combinedInput.val(dateObj.toISOString());\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        \n        $dateInput.on(\"change\", updateCombinedValue);\n        $timeInput.on(\"change\", updateCombinedValue);\n        \n        // Validacija datuma\n        $dateInput.on(\"blur\", function () {\n            const value = $(this).val();\n            if (value) {\n                const dateObj = parseDate(value, dateFormat);\n                \n                if (!dateObj || isNaN(dateObj.getTime())) {\n                    $(this).addClass(\"is-invalid\");\n                    $combinedInput.val(\"\");\n                    return;\n                }\n                \n                $(this).removeClass(\"is-invalid\");\n            }\n        });\n    });\n});\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\\wwwroot\\js\\datetime-control.js"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_017yqAmazQNKGkET25di8fif__vscode-1779206013932","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

{"timestamp":"2026-05-20T21:21:57.524Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\.github\\skills\\lab4-testing-skill\\SKILL.md","content":"---\ndescription: \"Testiranje Lab-4 projekta - CRUD operacije, validacija, autocomplete, datumska kontrola\"\napplyTo:\n  - \"**/Controllers/*Controller.cs\"\n  - \"**/Services/*Repository.cs\"\n  - \"**/Models/*.cs\"\n---\n\n# Lab 4 - Strategija Testiranja\n\nOvaj skill pru+Ņaja smjernice za testiranje Lab 4 projekta. Prema zahtjevima vje+Ņbe trebate testirati:\n\n‘Ěý **CRUD operacije** - Create, Read, Update, Delete  \n‘Ěý **Validacija** - client-side + server-side  \n‘Ěý **Autocomplete dropdown** - AJAX pretraga  \n‘Ěý **Soft delete** - DeletedAt polje umjesto fizi¶Źkog brisanja  \n‘Ěý **Datumska kontrola** - format ovisno o kulturi (hr/en)  \n‘Ěý **JavaScript animacije** - napredno kori+Ūtenje JavaScripta  \n\n---\n\n## +Što Testirati - Test Strategija\n\n### 1. **CRUD Operacije**\n\n| Operacija | Test Scenarij | O¶Źekivani Rezultat |\n|-----------|--------------|-------------------|\n| **Create** | Kreiraj novu entitetu s valjanim podacima | Entitet se pojavljuje u bazi |\n| | Kreiraj s nevaljanim podacima | Validacijska gre+Ūka, bez spremanja |\n| | Kreiraj s praznom obaveznom poljem | Server validacija odbija |\n| **Read** | U¶Źitaj listu entiteta | Sve entitete (gdje je DeletedAt = null) |\n| | U¶Źitaj detalje jedne entitete | Prikazane sve informacije |\n| **Update** | A+Ņuriraj postoje¶Áu entitetu | Promjene se spravljaju u bazu |\n| | A+Ņuriraj s nevaljanim podacima | Validacijska gre+Ūka |\n| **Delete** | Obri+Ūi entitetu | DeletedAt se postavlja (soft delete) |\n| | Obrisana entiteta ne pojavljuje se u listama | Filter na DeletedAt = null radi |\n\n### 2. **Validacija**\n\n- **Server-side:** Model.IsValid u controlleru\n- **Client-side:** HTML5 atributi + jQuery validacija\n- **Testiranje:** POST zahtjev s nevaljanim podacima mora vratiti 400 ili ponovno prikazati view\n\n### 3. **Autocomplete Dropdown**\n\n- Endpoint koji vra¶Áa JSON rezultate pretrage\n- AJAX poziv s parametrom `query`\n- Vra¶Áeni rezultati formatiraju se u dropdownu\n\n### 4. **Soft Delete**\n\n```csharp\n// Umjesto brisanja, postavi DeletedAt\nentity.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\nawait _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n// Kod ¶Źitanja filtrira obrisane\nvar items = await _dbContext.Set<MyEntity>()\n    .Where(x => x.DeletedAt == null)\n    .ToListAsync();\n```\n\n---\n\n## Primjer: Test CRUD Operacije za Book Entitet\n\n### Preduvjet\n\nTrebate xUnit + testni DbContext s InMemory bazom podataka.\n\n### Instalacija\n\n```powershell\ncd c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\n\n# Dodaj test pakete (ako nedostaju)\ndotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory\ndotnet add package xunit\ndotnet add package xunit.runner.visualstudio\n```\n\n---\n\n## Test Primjer - BookRepository CRUD Test\n\nKreirajte datoteku `Tests/BookRepositoryTests.cs`:\n\n```csharp\nusing Xunit;\nusing Lab4.Models;\nusing Lab4.Services;\nusing Lab4.Data;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace Lab4.Tests\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Testira sve CRUD operacije za Books entitet\n    /// </summary>\n    public class BookRepositoryTests\n    {\n        // Metoda koja kreira testni DbContext s InMemory bazom\n        private ApplicationDbContext GetInMemoryDbContext()\n        {\n            var options = new DbContextOptionsBuilder<ApplicationDbContext>()\n                .UseInMemoryDatabase(Guid.NewGuid().ToString())  // Jedinstvena baza za svaki test\n                .Options;\n\n            var context = new ApplicationDbContext(options);\n            context.Database.EnsureCreated();\n            return context;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Kreiraj novu knji+Ņu i provjeri da se pojavljuje u bazi\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator dodaje novu knji+Ņu\n        /// 1. Kreira novu Book entitetu s valjanim podacima\n        /// 2. Sprema ju u bazu kroz repository\n        /// 3. Provjerava da se knji+Ņu mo+Ņe u¶Źitati po ID-u\n        /// 4. Provjerava da su svi podaci to¶Źni\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithValidData_ShouldSaveToDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE - Pripremite testni scenarij\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            var newBook = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Gospodar Prstenova\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928227\",\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1954, 7, 29),\n                Pages = 569,\n                AuthorId = 1,\n                PublisherId = 1\n            };\n\n            // ACT - Izvedite akciju koju testzirate\n            await repository.CreateAsync(newBook);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjerite rezultat\n            var savedBook = await context.Books\n                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Title == \"Gospodar Prstenova\");\n\n            Assert.NotNull(savedBook);\n            Assert.Equal(\"978-0547928227\", savedBook.Isbn);\n            Assert.Equal(569, savedBook.Pages);\n            Assert.Null(savedBook.DeletedAt);  // Ne smije biti obrisana\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: A+Ņuriraj postoje¶Áu knji+Ņu i provjeri da se promjene spravljaju\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator mijenja broj stranica knji+Ņu\n        /// 1. U¶Źita postoje¶Áu knji+Ņu iz baze\n        /// 2. Mijenja Pages svojstvo\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da se promjena vidi u bazi\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task UpdateBook_WithNewPageCount_ShouldUpdateDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+Ņu\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Hobbit\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928186\",\n                Pages = 310,\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1937, 9, 21)\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - A+Ņuriraj broj stranica\n            var bookToUpdate = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToUpdate.Pages = 320;  // Promijenjena vrijednost\n            context.Books.Update(bookToUpdate);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se promjena vidi\n            var updatedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.Equal(320, updatedBook.Pages);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Obri+Ūi knji+Ņu (soft delete) i provjeri da DeletedAt bude postavljen\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator bri+Ūe knji+Ņu iz kataloga\n        /// 1. U¶Źita knji+Ņu iz baze\n        /// 2. Postavi DeletedAt na trenutno vrijeme\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da obrisana knji+Ņu ne pojavljuje se u listama\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task DeleteBook_SoftDelete_ShouldSetDeletedAtNotNull()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+Ņu\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"1984\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - Soft delete (postavi DeletedAt)\n            var bookToDelete = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToDelete.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n            context.Books.Update(bookToDelete);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se obrisana knji+Ņu ne pojavljuje\n            var activeBooks = await context.Books\n                .Where(b => b.DeletedAt == null)\n                .ToListAsync();\n\n            Assert.DoesNotContain(activeBooks, b => b.Id == bookId);\n\n            // Provjeri da DeletedAt nije null\n            var deletedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.NotNull(deletedBook.DeletedAt);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Validacija obaveznog polja (Title)\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Korisnik poku+Ūava kreiranu knji+Ņu bez naslova\n        /// 1. Kreira entitetu bez Title svojstva\n        /// 2. Validacija bi trebala detektirati gre+Ūku\n        /// 3. Podaci se ne spravljaju u bazu\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithoutTitle_ShouldFailValidation()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = null,  // Nedostaje obavezno polje\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n\n            // ACT & ASSERT - Validation ¶Áe biti provjeravana na model level\n            var validationContext = new System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationContext(book);\n            var results = new List<System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationResult>();\n            bool isValid = System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Validator.TryValidateObject(book, validationContext, results, true);\n\n            Assert.False(isValid);\n            Assert.NotEmpty(results);\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Kako Pokrenuti Testove\n\n### 1. **Instalacija Test Framework-a** (ako nedostaje)\n\n```powershell\ncd c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\n\n# xUnit je obi¶Źno ve¶Á instaliran\ndotnet add package xunit\ndotnet add package xunit.runner.visualstudio\ndotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory\n```\n\n### 2. **Pokretanje Testova iz Terminala**\n\n```powershell\ncd c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\n\n# Pokreni sve testove\ndotnet test\n\n# Pokreni samo odre¶Ňeni test\ndotnet test --filter \"BookRepositoryTests\"\n\n# Pokreni s verbozim outputom\ndotnet test -v d\n```\n\n### 3. **Pokretanje Testova iz VS Codea**\n\n- Otvori **Test Explorer** (`Ctrl+Shift+@` ili preko Command Palette)\n- Desni klik na test ‘śŚ **Run Test**\n- Ili kliknite **Run All** za sve testove\n\n---\n\n## +Što Testira Gornji Primjer?\n\n| Test | +Što Provjerava | Razlog |\n|------|----------------|--------|\n| `CreateBook_WithValidData` | CRUD Create operacija | Mo+Ņe li se novaJest knji+Ņu sprema u bazu? |\n| `UpdateBook_WithNewPageCount` | CRUD Update operacija | Mo+Ņe li se postoje¶Áa knji+Ņu a+Ņurirati? |\n| `DeleteBook_SoftDelete` | Soft Delete (DeletedAt) | Je li DeletedAt postavljen, a knji+Ņu logi¶Źki obrisana? |\n| `CreateBook_WithoutTitle` | Server-side Validacija | Sprje¶Źava li validacija unos nevaljanog Title-a? |\n\n---\n\n## Dodatni Test Scenariji (Napredni)\n\n### Test Autocomplete Endpointa\n\n```csharp\n[Fact]\npublic async Task SearchBooks_WithQuery_ShouldReturnFilteredResults()\n{\n    // ARRANGE\n    var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n    context.Books.Add(new Book { Title = \"Hobbit\" });\n    context.Books.Add(new Book { Title = \"1984\" });\n    context.Books.Add(new Book { Title = \"Hobbit Returns\" });\n    await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n    // ACT - Pretraga Books gdje Title sadr+Ņi \"Hobbit\"\n    var results = context.Books\n        .Where(b => b.Title.Contains(\"Hobbit\") && b.DeletedAt == null)\n        .Take(10)\n        .ToList();\n\n    // ASSERT\n    Assert.Equal(2, results.Count);\n    Assert.All(results, b => Assert.Contains(\"Hobbit\", b.Title));\n}\n```\n\n### Test Validacije Datumske Kontrole\n\n```csharp\n[Theory]\n[InlineData(\"2024-01-01\")]\n[InlineData(\"1900-01-01\")]\n[InlineData(\"2099-12-31\")]\npublic void PublicationDate_WithValidDates_ShouldParse(string dateString)\n{\n    // Test da parser podr+Ņava razli¶Źite datumske formate\n    var parsed = DateTime.Parse(dateString);\n    Assert.NotEqual(default, parsed);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Checklist - +Što Testirati u Lab 4\n\n- [ ] Kreiraj novu entitetu (Create)\n- [ ] U¶Źitaj listu entiteta (Read)\n- [ ] A+Ņuriraj entitetu (Update)\n- [ ] Obri+Ūi entitetu s soft delete (Delete)\n- [ ] Validacija obaveznog polja (Server-side)\n- [ ] Autocomplete pretraga vra¶Áa filtrirane rezultate\n- [ ] DeletedAt filter - obrisane ne pojavljuju se\n- [ ] Datumska kontrola - format ovisno o kulturi\n- [ ] AJAX dropdown - asinkrona pretraga radi\n\n---\n\n## Savjet: Testirajte Prvo Jedno Entitete Potpuno\n\nBolje je imati 5 dobrih testova za jedan entitet nego 20 lo+Ūih testova za sve. {"timestamp":"2026-05-20T21:31:43.561Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\\Tests\\BookRepositoryTests.cs","content":"using Xunit;\nusing Lab4.Models;\nusing Lab4.Services;\nusing Lab4.Data;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace Lab4.Tests\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Testira sve CRUD operacije za Books entitet\n    /// Primjer: Za ostale entitete (Author, Genre, Publisher, Review) kopiraj ovaj pattern\n    /// </summary>\n    public class BookRepositoryTests\n    {\n        // Metoda koja kreira testni DbContext s InMemory bazom\n        private ApplicationDbContext GetInMemoryDbContext()\n        {\n            var options = new DbContextOptionsBuilder<ApplicationDbContext>()\n                .UseInMemoryDatabase(Guid.NewGuid().ToString())  // Jedinstvena baza za svaki test\n                .Options;\n\n            var context = new ApplicationDbContext(options);\n            context.Database.EnsureCreated();\n            return context;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Kreiraj novu knji+Ņu i provjeri da se pojavljuje u bazi\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator dodaje novu knji+Ņu\n        /// 1. Kreira novu Book entitetu s valjanim podacima\n        /// 2. Sprema ju u bazu kroz repository\n        /// 3. Provjerava da se knji+Ņu mo+Ņe u¶Źitati po ID-u\n        /// 4. Provjerava da su svi podaci to¶Źni\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithValidData_ShouldSaveToDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE - Pripremite testni scenarij\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            var newBook = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Gospodar Prstenova\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928227\",\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1954, 7, 29),\n                Pages = 569,\n                AuthorId = 1,\n                PublisherId = 1\n            };\n\n            // ACT - Izvedite akciju koju testirate\n            await repository.CreateAsync(newBook);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjerite rezultat\n            var savedBook = await context.Books\n                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Title == \"Gospodar Prstenova\");\n\n            Assert.NotNull(savedBook);\n            Assert.Equal(\"978-0547928227\", savedBook.Isbn);\n            Assert.Equal(569, savedBook.Pages);\n            Assert.Null(savedBook.DeletedAt);  // Ne smije biti obrisana\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: A+Ņuriraj postoje¶Áu knji+Ņu i provjeri da se promjene spravljaju\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator mijenja broj stranica knji+Ņu\n        /// 1. U¶Źita postoje¶Áu knji+Ņu iz baze\n        /// 2. Mijenja Pages svojstvo\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da se promjena vidi u bazi\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task UpdateBook_WithNewPageCount_ShouldUpdateDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+Ņu\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Hobbit\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928186\",\n                Pages = 310,\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1937, 9, 21)\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - A+Ņuriraj broj stranica\n            var bookToUpdate = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToUpdate.Pages = 320;  // Promijenjena vrijednost\n            context.Books.Update(bookToUpdate);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se promjena vidi\n            var updatedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.Equal(320, updatedBook.Pages);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Obri+Ūi knji+Ņu (soft delete) i provjeri da DeletedAt bude postavljen\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator bri+Ūe knji+Ņu iz kataloga\n        /// 1. U¶Źita knji+Ņu iz baze\n        /// 2. Postavi DeletedAt na trenutno vrijeme\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da obrisana knji+Ņu ne pojavljuje se u listama\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task DeleteBook_SoftDelete_ShouldSetDeletedAtNotNull()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+Ņu\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"1984\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - Soft delete (postavi DeletedAt)\n            var bookToDelete = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToDelete.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n            context.Books.Update(bookToDelete);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se obrisana knji+Ņu ne pojavljuje\n            var activeBooks = await context.Books\n                .Where(b => b.DeletedAt == null)\n                .ToListAsync();\n\n            Assert.DoesNotContain(activeBooks, b => b.Id == bookId);\n\n            // Provjeri da DeletedAt nije null\n            var deletedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.NotNull(deletedBook.DeletedAt);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Validacija obaveznog polja (Title)\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Korisnik poku+Ūava kreiranu knji+Ņu bez naslova\n        /// 1. Kreira entitetu bez Title svojstva\n        /// 2. Validacija bi trebala detektirati gre+Ūku\n        /// 3. Podaci se ne spravljaju u bazu\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithoutTitle_ShouldFailValidation()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = null,  // Nedostaje obavezno polje\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n\n            // ACT & ASSERT - Validation ¶Áe biti provjeravana na model level\n            var validationContext = new System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationContext(book);\n            var results = new List<System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationResult>();\n            bool isValid = System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Validator.TryValidateObject(book, validationContext, results, true);\n\n            Assert.False(isValid);\n            Assert.NotEmpty(results);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01SRVjYeL1v4oqeLw4V293S6__vscode-1779308363847","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

Lab5.Services;\n+using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\n+\n+namespace Lab5.Controllers.Api;\n+\n+[ApiController]\n+[Route(\"api/authors\")]\n+public class AuthorsApiController : ControllerBase\n+{\n+    private readonly IAuthorRepository _repository;\n+\n+    public AuthorsApiController(IAuthorRepository repository)\n+    {\n+        _repository = repository;\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet]\n+    public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<AuthorDto>>> GetAll([FromQuery] string? query = null)\n+    {\n+        var authors = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query)\n+            ? await _repository.GetAllAsync()\n+            : await _repository.SearchAsync(query);\n+\n+        return Ok(authors.Select(ApiDtoMapper.ToDto));\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet(\"{id:int}\")]\n+    public async DbContextOptionsBuilder<CatalogDbContext>()\n            .UseInMemoryDatabase(Guid.NewGuid().ToString())\n            .Options;\n\n        var context = new CatalogDbContext(options);\n        context.Database.EnsureCreated();\n        return context;\n    }\n\n    private void SeedTestData(CatalogDbContext context)\n    {\n        // Seed Authors\n        var author1 = new Author\n        FavoriteGenre = \"Fantasy\",\n            ReputationPoints = 100,\n            IsPremiumMember = false\n        };\n\n        context.Authors.AddRange(author1, author2);\n        context.Publishers.Add(publisher1);\n        context.Genres.AddRange(genre1, genre2);\n        context.Users.Add(user1);\n        context.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    // ==================== BOOK REPOSITORY TESTS ====================\n\n    #region Book Repository Tests\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task BookRepository_CreateBook_WithValidData_ShouldSaveToDatabase()\n    {\n        // Arrange\n        var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n        SeedTestData(context);\n        var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n        var newBook = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"The Lord of the Rings\",\n            Isbn = \"978-0547928227\",\n            Description = \"Epic fantasy novel\",\n            PublishedOn = new DateTime(1954, 7, 29),\n            PageCount = 569,\n            Language = \"English\",\n            Status = BookStatus.Available,\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1\n        };\n\n        // Act\n        await repository.CreateAsync(newBook);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Assert\n        var savedBook = await context.Books\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Title == \"The Lord of the Rings\");\n        \n        Assert.NotNull(savedBook);\n        Assert.Equal(\"978-0547928227\", savedBook.Isbn);\n        Assert.Equal(569, savedBook.PageCount);\n        Assert.Equal(\"English\", savedBook.Language);\n        Assert.Null(savedBook.DeletedAt);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task BookRepository_CreateBook_WithMinimumValidData_ShouldSucceed()\n    {\n        // Arrange - najmanji mogu¶Ái valid podaci\n        var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n        SeedTestData(context);\n        var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n        var minimalBook = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"abc\", // Minimum 3 characters\n            Isbn = \"1234567890\", // Minimum 10 characters\n            PublishedOn = DateTime.UtcNow,\n            PageCount = 1, // Minimum 1\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1\n        };\n\n        // Act\n        await repository.CreateAsync(minimalBook);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Assert\n        Assert.True(minimalBook.Id > 0);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task BookRepository_CreateBook_WithMaximumPageCount_ShouldSucceed()\n GetInMemoryDbContext();\n        SeedTestData(context);\n        \n        var book = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"Original Title\",\n            Isbn = \"1234567890\",\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1\n        };\n        context.Books.Add(book);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n        var bookId = book.Id;\n\n        // Act\n        var bookToUpdate = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n        bookToUpdate!.Title = \"Updated Title\";\n        context.Books.Update(bookToUpdate);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Assert\n        var updatedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n        Assert.Equal(\"Updated Title\", updatedBook!.Title);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task BookRepository_UpdateBook_ChangeISBN_ShouldUpdateDatabase()\n    {\n        // Arrange\n        var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n        SeedTestData(context);\n        \n        var book = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"Test Book\",\n            Isbn = \"1111111111\",\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1\n        };\n        context.Books.Add(book);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Act\n        var toUpdate = await context.Books.FindAsync(book.Id);\n        toUpdate!.Isbn = \"2222222222\";\n        context.Books.Update(toUpdate);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Assert\n        var updated = await context.Books.FindAsync(book.Id);\n        Assert.Equal(\"2222222222\", updated!.Isbn);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task BookRepository_DeleteBook_SoftDelete_ShouldSetDeletedAt()\n    {\n        // Arrange\n        var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n        SeedTestData(context);\n        \n        var book = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"Book to Delete\",\n            Isbn = \"9876543210\",\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1\n        };\n        context.Books.Add(book);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n        var bookId = book.Id;\n\n        // Act\n        var toDelete = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n        toDelete!.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n        context.Books.Update(toDelete);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Assert\n        var deletedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n        Assert.NotNull(deletedBook!.DeletedAt);\n        \n        // Verify it doesn't appear in active list\n        var activeBooks = await context.Books\n            .Where(b => b.DeletedAt == null)\n            .ToListAsync();\n        Assert.DoesNotContain(activeBooks, b => b.Id == bookId);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task BookRepository_GetAll_FiltersDeletedBooks()\n    {\n        // Arrange\n        var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n        SeedTestData(context);\n        var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n        // Add one active and one deleted book\n        var activeBook = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"Active Book\",\n            Isbn = \"1111111111\",\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1\n        };\n\n        var deletedBook = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"Deleted Book\",\n            Isbn = \"2222222222\",\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1,\n            DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow\n        };\n\n        context.Books.AddRange(activeBook, deletedBook);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Act\n        var allBooks = await repository.GetAllAsync();\n\n        // Assert\n        Assert.DoesNotContain(allBooks, b => b.Title == \"Deleted Book\");\n        Assert.Contains(allBooks, b => b.Title == \"Active Book\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task BookRepository_GetById_ReturnsCorrectBook()\n    {\n        // Arrange\n        var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n        SeedTestData(context);\n        var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n        var book = new Book\n        {\n            Title = \"Specific Book\",\n            Isbn = \"1234567890\",\n            AuthorId = 1,\n            PublisherId = 1\n        };\n        context.Books.Add(book);\n        await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        // Act\n        var retrieved = await repository.GetByIdAsync(book.Id);\n\n        // Assert\n        Assert.NotNull(retrieved);\n        Assert.Equal(\"Specific Book\", retrieved!.Title);\n    }\n\n SeedTestData(context);\n        var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n        var books = Enumerable.Range(1, 5)\n            .Select(i => new Book\n            {\n                Title = repository.GetAllAsync();\n        var concurrentBooks = allBooks.Where(b => b.Title.StartsWith(\"Concurrent\")).ToList();\n\n        Assert.Equal(5, concurrentBooks.Count);\n    }\n\n Kako su testovi napisani?\n\nSvaki test slijedi **AAA (Arrange, Act, Assert)** pattern:\n\n```csharp\n[Fact]\npublic async Task CreateBook_WithValidData_ShouldSaveToDatabase()\n{\n    // ARRANGE - Pripremi podatke\n    var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n    var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n    \n    var newBook = new Book\n    {\n        Title = \"Gospodar Prstenova\",\n        Isbn = \"978-0547928227\",\n        PageCount = 569,\n        AuthorId = 1,\n        PublisherId = 1\n    };\n\n    // ACT - Izvedi akciju\n    await repository.CreateAsync(newBook);\n    await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n    // ASSERT - Provjeri rezultat\n    var savedBook = await context.Books\n        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Title == \"Gospodar Prstenova\");\n    \n    Assert.NotNull(savedBook);\n    Assert.Equal(569, savedBook.PageCount);\n    Assert.Null(savedBook.DeletedAt);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ‘Ěý Checklist - _context;\n\n    public BookAccessService(CatalogDbContext context)\n    {\n        _context = context;\n    }\n\n    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Book>> GetAuthorizedBooksAsync(string appUserId)\n    {\n        // Dohvati sve knjige na koje korisnik ima dozvolu (nije \"Denied\" i nije istekla)\n        var authorizedBookIds = await _context.BookAccesses\n            .Where(ba => ba.AppUserId == appUserId &&\n                         ba.AccessLevel != \"Denied\" &&\n                         ba.DeletedAt == null &&\n                         (ba.ExpiresAt == null || ba.ExpiresAt > DateTime.UtcNow))\n            .Select(ba => ba.BookId)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        var books = await _context.Books\n            .Where(b => b.DeletedAt == null && authorizedBookIds.Contains(b.Id))\n            .Include(b => b.Author)\n            .Include(b => b.Publisher)\n            .Include(b => b.BookGenres)\n            .ThenInclude(bg => bg.Genre)\n            .Include(b => b.Reviews)\n            .OrderBy(b => b.Title)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        return books;\n    }\n\n    public async Task<bool> HasAccessAsync(string appUserId, int ‘«Ų interaktivni alat koji stvara korisnika, home direktorij i tra+Ņi lozinku.\n+- `useradd -m -s /bin/bash <ime>` ‘«Ų ni+Ņi nivo (neinteraktivno) stvara korisnika i home.\n+- `chpasswd` ‘«Ų preuzme par `korisnik:lozinka` sa stdin i postavlja lozinku.\n+- `addgroup <ime>` / `groupadd` ‘«Ų stvara novu grupu.\n+- `adduser <korisnik> <grupa>` ‘«Ų dodaje korisnika u grupu (Debian/Ubuntu na¶Źin).\n+- `id <korisnik>` / `groups <korisnik>` ‘«Ų prikazuje UID, GID i ¶Źlanstva u grupama.\n+- `chown <vlasnik>[:<grupa>] <datoteka>` ‘«Ų mijenja vlasnika i opc. grupu.\n+- `chgrp <grupa> <datoteka>` ‘«Ų mijenja samo grupu vlasnika.\n+- `chmod [opcije] <mod> <datoteka>` ‘«Ų mijenja dozvole (npr. `g+rwx`, `o-r`).\n+- `su - <korisnik> -c 'komanda'` ‘«Ų pokre¶Áe jednu komandu kao korisnik i vra¶Áa output; `su - korisnik` otvara interaktivni shell.\n+- `umask <mask>` ‘«Ų postavlja po¶Źetne dozvole za novostvorene datoteke/direktorije.\n+- `tar cvzf arhiva.tgz *` ‘«Ų stvara gzipanu tar ako je postavljena kao ljuska za korisnika, korisnik se ne¶Áe mo¶Ái prijaviti interaktivno.\n+\n+3) Postavi izvr+Ūnost i testiraj:\n+\n+  chmod a+x zakljucaj.sh\n+  ./zakljucaj.sh\n+\n+4) Privremeno testiranje prijave kao `student`:\n+\n+  su - student\n+  # trebali biste vidjeti poruku i biti odmah prekinuti\n+\n+5) Postavi skriptu kao korisnikovu ljusku (test):\n+\n+  chsh -s /path/to/zakljucaj.sh student\n+\n+Napomena: `chsh` o¶Źekuje apsolutnu putanju i da joj je dozvoljeno biti valjana ljuska (mora biti navedena u `/etc/shells` na nekim sustavima). Ako ne¶Áe raditi, kopiraj skriptu u `/bin` ili `/usr/local/bin` i dodaj u `/etc/shells`.\n+\n+6) Kopiranje skripte u `/bin` i testiranje:\n+\n+  cp zakljucaj.sh /bin/zakljucaj.sh\n+  chown root:root /bin/zakljucaj.sh\n+  chmod 755 /bin/zakljucaj.sh\n+  chsh -s /bin/zakljucaj.sh student\n+\n+7) Vra¶Áanje ljuske na `/bin/bash` nakon testiranja:\n+\n+  chsh -s /bin/bash student\n+\n+8) Arhiviranje direktorija `/var/lib/mysql` sa datumski imenovanom arhivom:\n+\n+  #!/bin/bash\n+  OF=mysql$(date +%Y%m%d).tgz\n+  tar cvzfP $OF /var/lib/mysql\n+\n+Postavi dozvole: `chmod a+x mysql_backup.sh` i pokreni kao root.\n+\n+9) Skripta za provjeru i raspakiravanje arhive (u `/skripte`):\n+\n+```bash\n+#!/bin/bash\n+OF=mysql$(date +%Y%m%d).tgz\n+if [ -f \"$OF\" ]; then\n+  tar xvzf \"$OF\"\n+else\n+  echo \"arhiva ne postoji\"\n+fi\n+```\n+\n+10) Rad s tekstualnim datotekama (vi editor vje+Ņbe):\n+\n+- Kopiraj `jedan` iz `/uux` u `skripte`: `cp /uux/jedan ./skripte/`\n+- Otvori i editiraj u `vi`, dodaj ime, spremi, zatim izbri+Ūi sve osim imena, preimenuj s `:w 1.txt` i stvori `2.txt` s JMBAG-om.\n+\n+Obja+Ūnjenje: ove vje+Ņbe u¶Źe osnovne manipulacije datotekama i ure¶Ňiva¶Źima te rad s dozvolama i ljuskom.\n+\n+---\n+\n+## Zadatak 6 ‘«Ų mre+Ņa (konfiguracija i dijagnostika)\n+Zadatak 6 tra+Ņi konfiguraciju mre+Ņnih postavki (IP, maska, gateway), testiranje mre+Ņe i osnovne dijagnosti¶Źke alate.\n+\n+1) Privremena konfiguracija IP adrese (s `ip`):\n+\n+  sudo ip addr add 192.168.10.14/24 dev eth0\n+  sudo ip link set eth0 up\n+  sudo ip route add default via 192.168.10.1\n+\n+Provjera:\n+\n+  ip addr show dev eth0\n+  ip route show\n+\n+2) Alternativa s `ifconfig`/`route` (stari alati):\n+\n+  sudo ifconfig eth0 192.168.10.14 netmask 255.255.255.0 up\n+  sudo route add default gw 192.168.10.1\n+\n+3) DHCP (klijent):\n+\n+  sudo dhclient eth0\n+\n+4) Osnovno rje+Ūavanje problema:\n+\n+  ping 8.8.8.8\n+  traceroute 8.8.8.8\n+  tcpdump -i eth0\n+  netstat -tuln\n+  nslookup example.com\n+  dig example.com\n+\n+Obja+Ūnjenje: `ping` potvr¶Ňuje IP‘«Ňsloj; `traceroute` pokazuje put; `netstat`/`ss` prikazuju otvorene portove; `tcpdump` hvata promet.\n+\n+5) Dodavanje rute za specifi¶Źnu mre+Ņu:\n+\n+  sudo ip route add 192.168.16.0/24 via 192.168.10.1 dev eth0\n+\n+6) Spremanje konfiguracije trajno:\n+\n+- Na Debianu ure¶Ňuje se `/etc/network/interfaces` ili koristi NetworkManager/`/etc/netplan` ovisno o distribuciji.\n+- Za `/etc/network/interfaces` primjer:\n+\n+  auto eth0\n+  iface eth0 inet static\n+    address 192.168.10.14\n+    netmask 255.255.255.0\n+    gateway 192.168.10.1\n+\n+Nakon promjene: `sudo systemctl restart networking` ili `sudo ifdown eth0 && sudo ifup eth0`.\n+\n+7) DHCP poslu+Ņitelj (osnovno):\n+\n+- Instalacija: `sudo apt install isc-dhcp-server`\n+- Konfiguracija u `/etc/dhcp/dhcpd.conf`, restart `sudo systemctl restart isc-dhcp-server`.\n+\n+---\n+\n+## +Što dalje?\n+ - Ako +Ņeli+Ū, nadogradit ¶Áu dokument s primjerima konkretnog izlaza (pretpregled `ls -l` prije/poslije), vje+Ņbama s rje+Ūenjima ili automatiziranim testskim skriptama koje mo+Ņe+Ū pokrenuti lokalno.\n+\n+---\n+\n+Datoteka je spremna za pregled i daljnje prilagodbe.\n*** End Patch","explanation":"Append detailed solutions for tasks 5 and 6 into PoS456.md after the cheat-sheet and before '+Što dalje?'; Fokus je na razumijevanju pojmova i na tome kako se naredbe koriste u praksi.\n+\n+## 1. Osnovni UNIX pojmovi\n+\n+UNIX je visekorisnicki i visezadatni operacijski sustav. Korisnik nakon prijave ulazi u ljusku (shell), a shell je posrednik izmedu korisnika i kernela.\n+\n+Pojmovi koje treba znati:\n+- kernel - jezgra sustava\n+- shell - komandni interpreter\n+- home direktorij - korisnicki pocetni direktorij, npr. `/home/pero`\n+- root - administrator sustava\n+- apsolutna staza - pocinje sa `/`\n+- relativna staza - racuna se od trenutnog direktorija\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+pwd\n+cd /home/pero\n+cd ..\n+cd ~\n+```\n+\n+## 2. Struktura direktorija i staze\n+\n+Najvazniji direktoriji:\n+- `/bin` - osnovne naredbe\n+- `/sbin` - administrativne naredbe\n+- `/etc` - konfiguracijske datoteke\n+- `/home` - korisnicki direktoriji\n+- `/root` - home administratora\n+- `/var` - promjenjivi podaci i logovi\n+- `/usr` - vecina programa i biblioteka\n+- `/proc` - informacije o procesima i sustavu\n+- `/dev` - uredaji\n+\n+Posebne oznake:\n+- `.` - trenutni direktorij\n+- `..` - roditeljski direktorij\n+- `~` - home direktorij korisnika\n+- `*` - svi zapisi koji odgovaraju uzorku\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+ls -la\n+cd ..\n+ls /etc\n+```\n+\n+## 3. Osnovne CLI naredbe\n+\n+Ovo su naredbe koje se najcesce pojavljuju kao osnova za rad s datotekama i direktorijima.\n+\n+### `pwd`\n+Ispisuje trenutnu apsolutnu stazu.\n+\n+```bash\n+pwd\n+```\n+\n+### `cd`\n+Mijenja direktorij.\n+\n+```bash\n+cd /home/pero\n+cd ..\n+cd ~\n+```\n+\n+### `ls`\n+Ispisuje sadrzaj direktorija.\n+\n+Najcesce opcije:\n+- `-l` - detaljan ispis\n+- `-a` - prikazuje i skrivene datoteke\n+- `-h` - razumljive velicine\n+\n+```bash\n+ls\n+ls -la\n+```\n+\n+### `mkdir` i `rmdir`\n+`mkdir` stvara direktorij, `rmdir` brise prazni direktorij.\n+\n+```bash\n+mkdir test\n+rmdir test\n+```\n+\n+### `rm`\n+Brise datoteke i, uz `-r`, direktorije.\n+\n+```bash\n+rm datoteka.txt\n+rm -r direktorij\n+rm -rf direktorij\n+```\n+\n+Upozorenje: `rm -rf *` je vrlo opasno.\n+\n+### `cp`\n+Kopira datoteke i direktorije.\n+\n+Opcije:\n+- `-r` - rekurzivno kopiranje direktorija\n+- `-a` - cuva vlasnistvo i dozvole\n+\n+```bash\n+cp izvor.txt odrediste.txt\n+cp -r direktorij1 direktorij2\n+```\n+\n+### `mv`\n+Premjesta ili preimenuje datoteke i direktorije.\n+\n+```bash\n+mv stari.txt novi.txt\n+mv datoteka.txt /tmp/\n+```\n+\n+### `ln`\n+Stvara link.\n+\n+```bash\n+ln datoteka link\n+ln -s /putanja/do/datoteke link\n+```\n+\n+## 4. Redirekcija, cjevovodi i ispis\n+\n+### Redirekcija\n+- `>` - zapis u datoteku\n+- `>>` - dodavanje na kraj datoteke\n+- `<` - citanje iz datoteke\n+- `2>` - standardna greska u datoteku\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+ls -al > izlaz.txt\n+echo test >> izlaz.txt\n+more < izlaz.txt\n+```\n+\n+### Cjevovodi `|`\n+Izlaz jedne naredbe ide na ulaz druge.\n+\n+```bash\n+ls -al | more\n+ps -ef | grep bash\n+```\n+\n+### Korisne naredbe za prikaz sadrzaja\n+- `cat` - ispisuje cijelu datoteku\n+- `more` - pregled po stranicama\n+- `less` - napredniji pregled po stranicama\n+- `head` - prvih nekoliko redaka\n+- `tail` - zadnjih nekoliko redaka\n+- `wc` - broji redke, rijeci i znakove\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+cat dat.txt\n+head -n 5 dat.txt\n+tail -n 5 dat.txt\n+wc dat.txt\n+```\n+\n+### Obrada teksta\n+- `sort` - sortira\n+- `join` - spaja dvije datoteke po zajednickom polju\n+- `paste` - spaja datoteke stupcasto\n+- `split` - dijeli datoteku\n+- `nl` - numerira redke\n+- `tr` - zamjena znakova\n+- `cut` - izdvajanje stupaca ili znakova\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+sort dat.txt\n+join dat1 dat2\n+paste dat1 dat2\n+cut -d: -f1 /etc/passwd\n+tr 'a-z' 'A-Z'\n+```\n+\n+## 5. Pomo¶Á i informacije o naredbama\n+\n+### `man`\n+Prikazuje prirucnik za naredbu.\n+\n+```bash\n+man cp\n+```\n+\n+### `type`\n+Pokazuje je li naredba ugra¶Ňena u ljusku ili vanjska naredba.\n+\n+```bash\n+type cd\n+type -a ls\n+```\n+\n+### `time`\n+Mjeri vrijeme izvodenja naredbe.\n+\n+```bash\n+time ls -al\n+```\n+\n+## 6. Aliasi i varijable ljuske\n+\n+### Alias\n+Privremeni alias vrijedi samo u trenutnoj sesiji.\n+\n+```bash\n+alias bye='exit'\n+alias l='ls -al'\n+unalias bye\n+```\n+\n+Trajni alias se upisuje u `~/.bashrc`.\n+\n+```bash\n+alias cd..='cd ..'\n+alias l='ls -al'\n+source ~/.bashrc\n+```\n+\n+### Varijable\n+Lokalna varijabla:\n+\n+```bash\n+IME=Pero\n+```\n+\n+Globalna varijabla:\n+\n+```bash\n+export IME=Pero\n+unset IME\n+printenv\n+set\n+```\n+\n+## 7. Uredivaci teksta\n+\n+### `vi` / `vim`\n+Najvazniji modalni editor u gradivu.\n+\n+Osnovni mod:\n+- `h j k l` - kretanje\n+- `w e b` - kretanje po rijecima\n+- `gg` - pocetak datoteke\n+- `G` - kraj datoteke\n+- `x` - brisanje znaka\n+- `dd` - brisanje retka\n+- `yy` - kopiranje retka\n+- `p` - umetanje nakon kursora\n+\n+Unos teksta:\n+- `i` - insert\n+- `a` - append\n+- `o` - novi red ispod\n+\n+Naredbeni mod:\n+- `:w` - spremi\n+- `:q` - izlaz\n+- `:q!` - izlaz bez spremanja\n+- `:wq` - spremi i izadji\n+- `/niz` - pretraga\n+- `:set nu` - linijski brojevi\n+\n+### `nano`\n+Jednostavniji editor s prikazom pre¶Źaca.\n+\n+Najcesce:\n+- `Ctrl+O` - spremi\n+- `Ctrl+X` - izlaz\n+- `Ctrl+W` - pretraga\n+- `Ctrl+K` - izrezi redak\n+- `Ctrl+U` - zalijepi\n+\n+### `ed` i `sed`\n+`ed` je linijski uredivac, a `sed` sluzi za automatsku obradu teksta.\n+\n+Primjer `sed` zamjene:\n+\n+```bash\n+sed 's/staro/novo/' dat.txt\n+```\n+\n+## 8. Skripte u bashu\n+\n+Svaka skripta obicno pocinje sa shebangom:\n+\n+```bash\n+#!/bin/bash\n+```\n+\n+Skripta se obicno mora oznaciti kao izvrsna:\n+\n+```bash\n+chmod a+x skripta.sh\n+./skripta.sh\n+```\n+\n+Korisne stvari u skriptama:\n+- `echo` - ispis\n+- `read` - unos\n+- `if` - grananje\n+- `for`, `while` - petlje\n+- `function` - funkcije\n+- `return` - povratna vrijednost funkcije\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+#!/bin/bash\n+echo \"Pozdrav\"\n+ime=\"Pero\"\n+echo \"$ime\"\n+```\n+\n+Unos od korisnika:\n+\n+```bash\n+#!/bin/bash\n+read -p \"Unesi ime: \" ime\n+echo \"Unio si $ime\"\n+```\n+\n+Uvjet:\n+\n+```bash\n+#!/bin/bash\n+if [ -d /home/pero ]; then\n+  echo \"Direktorij postoji\"\n+else\n+  echo \"Direktorij ne postoji\"\n+fi\n+```\n+\n+Petlja:\n+\n+```bash\n+#!/bin/bash\n+for i in 1 2 3; do\n+  echo \"$i\"\n+done\n+```\n+\n+## 9. Arhiviranje i datumi\n+\n+`tar` stvara arhive, cesto uz kompresiju.\n+\n+Najcesce opcije:\n+- `c` - create\n+- `x` - extract\n+- `v` - verbose\n+- `z` - gzip\n+- `f` - ime arhive\n+- `P` - cuva apsolutne putanje\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+tar czfP arhiva.tar.gz /home/pero\n+tar xzf arhiva.tar.gz\n+```\n+\n+Datumsko ime arhive:\n+\n+```bash\n+OF=mysql$(date +%Y%m%d).tgz\n+tar cvzfP \"$OF\" /var/lib/mysql\n+```\n+\n+## 10. Korisnici, grupe i dozvole\n+\n+### Korisnici i grupe\n+- `adduser` - interaktivno dodavanje korisnika\n+- `useradd` - nizniji alat za dodavanje korisnika\n+- `passwd` - postavlja lozinku\n+- `groupadd` - dodaje grupu\n+- `usermod` - mijenja korisnika\n+- `chsh` - mijenja ljusku korisnika\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+adduser pero\n+passwd pero\n+chsh -s /bin/bash pero\n+```\n+\n+### Dozvole\n+Dozvole se gledaju kroz `ls -l` i mijenjaju pomocu `chmod`, `chown` i `chgrp`.\n+\n+Primjer:\n+\n+```bash\n+chmod 755 skripta.sh\n+chmod a+x skripta.sh\n+chown pero:pero datoteka.txt\n+chgrp users datoteka.txt\n+```\n+\n+Znacenje bitova:\n+- `r` - read\n+- `w` - write\n+- `x` - execute\n+\n+## 11. Procesi\n+\n+Proces je instanca programa u izvodenju. Svaki proces ima PID i PPID.\n+\n+### Pregled procesa\n+- `ps` - popis procesa\n+- `ps -ef` - detaljni ispis\n+- `ps -u korisnik` - procesi korisnika\n+- `ps -eo pid,ppid,user,args,nice --sort pid` - prilagoden ispis\n+\n+### Kontinuirani pregled\n+- `top` - stalni pregled procesa\n+- `htop` - ako je dostupan, prikladniji pregled\n+\n+### Pretraga procesa\n+- `pgrep` - trazi proces po imenu ili atributima\n+- `pstree` - prikaz stabla procesa\n+\n+### Stanja procesa\n+- `R` - aktivan\n+- `S` - spavajuci\n+- `D` - neprekinjiv sleep\n+- `T` - zaustavljen\n+- `Z` - zombi\n+\n+### Upravljanje procesima u ljusci\n+- `jobs` - procesi u pozadini\n+- `fg` - vrati u prvi plan\n+- `bg` - nastavi u pozadini\n+- `Ctrl+Z` - zaustavi trenutni proces\n+\n+### Prioriteti\n+- `nice -n PRIORITET naredba`\n+- `renice -n PRIORITET -p PID`\n+\n+### Signali\n+- `kill PID`\n+- `kill -9 PID`\n+- `killall ime`\n+- `pkill kriterij`\n+\n+Primjer:\n+\n+```bash\n+ps -ef | grep bash\n+kill -TERM 1234\n+pkill firefox\n+```\n+\n+## 12. Pokretanje sustava\n+\n+Redoslijed koji treba znati:\n+1. BIOS/UEFI izvodi POST\n+2. Bootloader ucitava jezgru\n+3. Jezgra se ucitava i inicijalizira sustav\n+4. Pokrece se init/systemd i servisi\n+\n+### GRUB\n+GRUB je bootloader. Bitno je znati da se konfigurira kroz datoteke u `/etc/default/grub` i `/etc/grub.d`, a generira se `grub.cfg`.\n+\n+Koristan pregled:\n+\n+```bash\n+update-grub\n+```\n+\n+### Naredba `dmesg`\n+Prikazuje poruke jezgre tijekom bootanja.\n+\n+```bash\n+dmesg\n+```\n+\n+### init, systemd i servisi\n+- `init` - stariji System V pristup\n+- `systemd` - moderni servisni sustav\n+- `systemctl start|stop|restart|enable|disable servis`\n+- `journalctl -b` - logovi trenutnog bootanja\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+systemctl status ssh\n+systemctl restart networking\n+journalctl -b\n+```\n+\n+## 13. Terminali i screen\n+\n+Na Linuxu postoji vise tekstualnih konzola, a `screen` omogucuje vise shell sesija u jednom terminalu.\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+screen\n+Ctrl+A C\n+Ctrl+A Space\n+Ctrl+A K\n+```\n+\n+## 14. Particije, mount i swap\n+\n+### Disk i particije\n+- `fdisk` - rad s particijama\n+- `mkfs.ext4` - formatiranje u ext4\n+- `mkswap` - priprema swap particije\n+- `swapon` / `swapoff` - ukljucivanje i iskljucivanje swap prostora\n+\n+### Mount\n+- `mount` - prikopcavanje datote¶Źnog sustava\n+- `umount` - odspajanje\n+- `/etc/fstab` - automatsko montiranje pri bootu\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+fdisk /dev/vda\n+mkfs.ext4 /dev/vda6\n+mount /dev/vda6 /disk\n+umount /disk\n+swapon -s\n+```\n+\n+### Swap\n+Swap je virtualna memorija na disku. Nakon `mkswap` sustav ga pocinje koristiti nakon `swapon`.\n+\n+## 15. Mreza\n+\n+### Osnovne informacije koje se postavljaju\n+- IP adresa\n+- mrezna maska\n+- gateway\n+- hostname\n+- DNS adrese\n+\n+### Stare naredbe\n+- `ifconfig` - prikaz i postavljanje sucelja\n+- `route` - tablica usmjeravanja\n+- `ifup` / `ifdown` - podizanje i spustanje sucelja\n+\n+Primjer:\n+\n+```bash\n+ifconfig eth0 192.168.10.14 netmask 255.255.255.0 up\n+route add default gw 192.168.10.1\n+```\n+\n+### Moderne naredbe\n+- `ip addr` - IP adrese\n+- `ip link` - podizanje/spustanje sucelja\n+- `ip route` - rute\n+\n+Primjer:\n+\n+```bash\n+ip addr add 192.168.10.14/24 dev eth0\n+ip link set eth0 up\n+ip route add default via 192.168.10.1\n+```\n+\n+### DHCP\n+- `dhclient` - DHCP klijent\n+- `isc-dhcp-server` - DHCP poslu+Ņitelj\n+\n+### Dijagnostika\n+- `ping` - provjera dostupnosti\n+- `traceroute` - put do odredista\n+- `tcpdump` - pracenje mreznog prometa\n+- `netstat` - portovi, veze, rute\n+- `nslookup` - DNS upit\n+- `dig` - detaljniji DNS upit\n+\n+Primjeri:\n+\n+```bash\n+ping 8.8.8.8\n+traceroute 8.8.8.8\n+tcpdump -i eth0 arp\n+netstat -tuln\n+nslookup example.com\n+dig example.com\n+```\n+\n+## 16. Sigurnosna stijena\n+\n+Sigurnosna stijena filtrira promet i stvara sigurnosnu zonu. Bitne vrste:\n+- packet filtering firewall\n+- circuit-level gateway\n+- stateful inspection firewall\n+- application-level gateway / proxy\n+- next-generation firewall\n+\n+Bitno je znati osnovnu svrhu: propu+Ūtanje ili blokiranje prometa prema pravilima.\n+\n+## 17. Sto najcesce treba znati za ispit\n+\n+Ako ucis brzo, fokusiraj se na ovo:\n+1. Putanje i kretanje kroz direktorije: `pwd`, `cd`, `ls`\n+2. Rad s datotekama: `cp`, `mv`, `rm`, `mkdir`, `rmdir`\n+3. Redirekcije i pipes: `>`, `>>`, `<`, `|`\n+4. Pregled i obrada teksta: `cat`, `more`, `less`, `head`, `tail`, `sort`, `join`, `paste`, `cut`, `tr`\n+5. Aliasi, varijable i skripte: `alias`, `export`, `unset`, `bash`, `chmod a+x`\n+6. Procesi: `ps`, `top`, `pgrep`, `pstree`, `jobs`, `fg`, `bg`, `kill`\n+7. Boot i servisi: `dmesg`, `grub`, `init`, `systemd`, `systemctl`, `journalctl`\n+8. Mreza: `ip`, `ifconfig`, `route`, `ping`, `traceroute`, `tcpdump`, `nslookup`, `dig`\n+9. Particije i mount: `fdisk`, `mkfs.ext4`, `mount`, `umount`, `mkswap`, `swapon`\n+\n+## 18. Brzi mini-primjeri za ponavljanje\n+\n+```bash\n+# napravi direktorij i udji u njega\n+mkdir test\n+cd test\n+\n+# kopiranje i premjestanje\n+cp /uux/jedan .\n+mv jedan jedan.txt\n+\n+# pregled sadrzaja\n+less jedan.txt\n+\n+# nadji proces\n+ps -ef | grep bash\n+\n+# pokreni skriptu\n+chmod a+x script.sh\n+./script.sh\n+```\n+\n+## 19. Kako uciti iz ovog sazetka\n+\n+- Prvo nauci sto znaci svaka naredba.\n+- Zatim vjezbaj jednu prakticnu situaciju po naredbi.\n+- Na ispitu se obicno trazi kombinacija: navigacija, kopiranje, prikaz, preusmjeravanje, skripte, procesi, mreza i particije.\n+\n*** End Patch"},"tool_use_id":"call_tyKdWjyHert2pKHdGI5Z3PuO__vscode-1780942186410","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

DODAJ OVO NA PO¶ÓETAK\n\n// Prije: var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\n// ODMAH NAKON var builder:\nLog.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration()\n    .MinimumLevel.Information()\n    .WriteTo.File(\n        path: \"Logs/app-.log\",\n        rollingInterval: RollingInterval.Day,\n        outputTemplate: \"{Timestamp:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff zzz} [{Level:u3}] {Message:lj}{NewLine}{Exception}\"\n    )\n    .CreateLogger();\n\nbuilder.Logging.AddSerilog(Log.Logger);\n```\n\n**+Što ¶Áe se desiti:**\n- Svaki dan ¶Áe se kreirati nova log datoteka (`app-2026-07-08.log`, `app-2026-07-09.log`, itd.)\n- Logger ¶Áe biti dostupan u svim kontrolerima\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 4: Dodaj Logging u BooksController.cs**\n\n**Otvori:** `ispit/Controllers/BooksController.cs`\n\n**Na po¶Źetku klase dodaj:**\n```csharp\nprivate readonly ILogger<BooksController> _logger;\n\npublic BooksController(\n _logger = logger;  // ‘ś… SPREMI LOGGER\n}\n```\n\n**Sada u svakoj akciji dodaj logove:**\n\n```csharp\n[AllowAnonymous]\n[Route(\"\")]\n[Route(\"index\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> Index()\n{\n    _logger.LogInformation(\"≠ŤŰĺ Index pristup - Popis svih knjiga\");\n    var currentUser = await _userManager.GetUserAsync(User);\n    var books = await _bookRepository.GetAllAsyncForUserAsync(currentUser?.Id);\n    _logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý U¶Źitano {BookCount} knjiga\", books.Count);\n    return View(books);\n}\n\n[Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n[HttpPost]\n[Route(\"create\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> Create(Book model)\n{\n    _logger.LogInformation(\"≠ŤŰ£ Poku+Ūaj kreiranja knjige: {BookTitle}\", model.Title);\n    \n    // ... postoje¶Ái kod ...\n    \n    try\n    {\n        await _bookRepository.CreateAsync(model);\n        _logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý Knjiga uspje+Ūno kreirana: {BookId} - {BookTitle}\", model.Id, model.Title);\n        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n    }\n    catch (Exception ex)\n    {\n        _logger.LogError(ex, \"‘£Ó Gre+Ūka pri kreiranju knjige: {BookTitle}\", model.Title);\n        ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, \"Gre+Ūka: \" + ex.Message);\n        return View(model);\n    }\n}\n\n[Authorize(Roles = \"Admin\")]\n[HttpPost]\n[Route(\"delete/{id:int}\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n{\n    _logger.LogInformation(\"≠ŤĆŇī™∆ Poku+Ūaj brisanja knjige ID: {BookId}\", id);\n    \n    try\n    {\n        var success = await _bookRepository.DeleteAsync(id);\n        if (success)\n        {\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý Knjiga uspje+Ūno obrisana: {BookId}\", id);\n            return Json(new { success = true, message = \"Knjiga je uspje+Ūno obrisana\" });\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            _logger.LogWarning(\"‘‹Šī™∆ Knjiga nije prona¶Ňena: {BookId}\", id);\n            return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Knjiga nije prona¶Ňena\" });\n        }\n    }\n    catch (Exception ex)\n    {\n        _logger.LogError(ex, \"‘£Ó Gre+Ūka pri brisanju knjige: {BookId}\", id);\n        return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Gre+Ūka: \" + ex.Message });\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 5: Dodaj Logging u Druge
