Kopiraj klju¶Ź (po¶Źinje s sk-ant-...)\n5. ¶ÓUVAJ TAJNO! ≠ŤŲ…\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 2: Dodaj NuGet Paket**\n\n**Otvori:** `ispit/Lab5.csproj`\n\n**Dodaj u <ItemGroup>:**\n```xml\n<PackageReference Include=\"Anthropic.Sdk\" Version=\"0.9.0\" />\n```\n\n**Ili preko Package Manager Console:**\n```powershell\nInstall-Package Anthropic.Sdk\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 3: Dodaj API Key u Secrets**\n\n**U Visual Studio:**\n```\nDesni klik na ispit projekt ‘śŚ Manage User Secrets\n```\n\n**Otvori se datoteka, dodaj:**\n```json\n{\n    \"Anthropic\": {\n        \"ApiKey\": \"sk-ant-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx\"\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**¶ÓUVAJ DATOTEKU - to je tajno!**\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 4: Kreiraj AIService**\n\n**Kreiraj novi file:** `ispit/Services/AIService.cs`\n\n```csharp\nusing Anthropic;\nusing System.Text.Json;\n\nnamespace Lab5.Services;\n\npublic interface IAIService\n{\n    Task<ReviewData> ExtractReviewFromPromptAsync(string prompt);\n}\n\npublic class AIService : IAIService\n{\n    private readonly string _apiKey;\n    private readonly ILogger<AIService> _logger;\n\n    public AIService(string apiKey, ILogger<AIService> logger)\n    {\n        _apiKey = apiKey;\n        _logger = logger;\n    }\n\n    public async Task<ReviewData> ExtractReviewFromPromptAsync(string prompt)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"≠Ť•ĺ AI: Parsiranje promptja: {Prompt}\", prompt);\n\n            var client = new Anthropic(_apiKey);\n\n            var message = await client.Messages.CreateAsync(new()\n            {\n                Model = \"claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022\",\n                MaxTokens = 1024,\n                Messages = new[]\n                {\n                    new MessageParam\n                    {\n                        Role = \"user\",\n                        Content = $@\"Parsiraj sljede¶Áu recenziju i vrati SAMO JSON (bez dodatnog teksta):\n                        \n{{\n    \"\"bookTitle\"\": \"\"naziv knjige koju trebam prona¶Ái\"\",\n    \"\"score\"\": 1-5 broj,\n    \"\"sentiment\"\": \"\"Positive\"\" ili \"\"Neutral\"\" ili \"\"Critical\"\" ili \"\"Enthusiastic\"\",\n    \"\"isRecommended\"\": true ili false,\n    \"\"comment\"\": \"\"tekst recenzije (do 200 znakova)\"\"\n}}\n\nULAZ: {prompt}\n\nVA+ĮNO: Vrati SAMO JSON, bez markdown formatiranja, bez dodatnog teksta!\"\n                    }\n                }\n            });\n\n            var jsonContent = message.Content[0].Text;\n            \n            _logger.LogInformation(\"≠Ť•ĺ AI Odgovor: {Response}\", jsonContent);\n\n            // O¶Źisti JSON ako ima markdown formatiranja\n            jsonContent = jsonContent.Replace(\"```json\", \"\").Replace(\"```\", \"\").Trim();\n\n            var reviewData = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<ReviewData>(jsonContent);\n\n            if (reviewData == null)\n            {\n                _logger.LogWarning(\"‘‹Šī™∆ AI: Nije mogao parsirati JSON: {Json}\", jsonContent);\n                throw new Exception(\"AI nije vratio valjani JSON\");\n            }\n\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý AI: Uspje+Ūno parsirano - {BookTitle}, Ocjena: {Score}\", \n                reviewData.BookTitle, reviewData.Score);\n\n            return reviewData;\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            _logger.LogError(ex, \"‘£Ó AI Gre+Ūka pri parsiranju\");\n            throw;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\npublic class ReviewData\n{\n    [JsonPropertyName(\"bookTitle\")]\n    public string BookTitle { get; set; }\n\n    [JsonPropertyName(\"score\")]\n    public int Score { get; set; }\n\n    [JsonPropertyName(\"sentiment\")]\n    public string Sentiment { get; set; }\n\n    [JsonPropertyName(\"isRecommended\")]\n    public bool IsRecommended { get; set; }\n\n    [JsonPropertyName(\"comment\")]\n    public string Comment { get; set; }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 5: Registriraj u Program.cs**\n\n**Otvori:** `ispit/Program.cs`\n\n**Dodaj u DI sekciju (gdje su ostali Services):**\n```csharp\n// Prije: app.Build();\n\nvar anthropicApiKey = builder.Configuration[\"Anthropic:ApiKey\"];\nif (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(anthropicApiKey))\n{\n    builder.Services.AddScoped<IAIService>(sp =>\n        new AIService(anthropicApiKey, sp.GetRequiredService<ILogger<AIService>>())\n    );\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 6: Dodaj Endpoint u ReviewsController**\n\n**Otvori:** `ispit/Controllers/ReviewsController.cs`\n\n**Na po¶Źetak klase dodaj:**\n```csharp\nprivate readonly IAIService _aiService;\n\npublic ReviewsController(\n    // ... ostali parametri ...\n    IAIService aiService)  // ‘ś… DODAJ OVO\n{\n    // ... ostali assignments ...\n    _aiService = aiService;\n}\n```\n\n**Dodaj novu akciju:**\n```csharp\n[AllowAnonymous]\n[HttpPost(\"create-from-ai\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> CreateFromAI([FromBody] AIPromptRequest request)\n{\n    try\n    {\n        _logger.LogInformation(\"≠Ť•ĺ Primljen AI prompt: {Prompt}\", request.Prompt);\n\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.Prompt))\n            return BadRequest(new { error = \"Prompt ne mo+Ņe biti prazan\" });\n\n        // 1. AI parsira prompt\n        var reviewData = await _aiService.ExtractReviewFromPromptAsync(request.Prompt);\n\n        // 2. Prona¶Ňi knjiga\n        var books = await _bookRepository.GetAllAsync();\n        var book = books.FirstOrDefault(b =>\n            b.Title.Contains(reviewData.BookTitle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));\n\n        if (book == null)\n        {\n            _logger.LogWarning(\"‘‹Šī™∆ Knjiga nije prona¶Ňena: {BookTitle}\", reviewData.BookTitle);\n            return BadRequest(new \n            { \n                error = $\"Knjiga '{reviewData.BookTitle}' nije prona¶Ňena\",\n                suggestion = \"Dostupne knjige: Harry Potter, Game of Thrones, Fellowship of the Ring\"\n            });\n        }\n\n        // 3. Prona¶Ňi korisnika\n        var currentUser = await _userManager.GetUserAsync(User);\n        if (currentUser == null)\n        {\n            // Koristi demo korisnika ako nije logged in\n            currentUser = (await _userRepository.GetAllAsync()).FirstOrDefault();\n        }\n\n        // 4. Kreiraj recenziju\n        var review = new Review\n        {\n            BookId = book.Id,\n            UserId = currentUser?.Id,\n            Score = reviewData.Score,\n            Comment = reviewData.Comment,\n            IsRecommended = reviewData.IsRecommended,\n            Title = reviewData.Comment.Substring(0, Math.Min(50, reviewData.Comment.Length)),\n            Sentiment = Enum.Parse<ReviewSentiment>(reviewData.Sentiment, ignoreCase: true),\n            ReviewedAt = DateTime.UtcNow\n        };\n\n        await _reviewRepository.CreateAsync(review);\n\n        _logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý Recenzija kreirana kroz AI: {BookTitle}, Score: {Score}\", \n            book.Title, reviewData.Score);\n\n        return Ok(new\n        {\n            success = true,\n            reviewId = review.Id,\n            message = $\"‘Ěý Recenzija kreirana za '{book.Title}'\",\n            review = new\n            {\n                bookTitle = book.Title,\n                score = review.Score,\n                comment = review.Comment,\n                sentiment = review.Sentiment.ToString()\n            }\n        });\n    }\n    catch (Exception ex)\n    {\n        _logger.LogError(ex, \"‘£Ó Gre+Ūka pri AI kreiranju recenzije\");\n        return BadRequest(new { error = ex.Message });\n    }\n}\n\npublic class AIPromptRequest\n{\n    public string Prompt { get; set; }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 7: Kreiraj Test View**\n\n**Kreiraj:** `ispit/Views/Reviews/CreateFromAI.cshtml`\n\n```html\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Kreiraj Recenziju - AI\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"container mt-5\">\n    <div class=\"row\">\n        <div class=\"col-md-8\">\n            <h2>≠Ť•ĺ Kreiraj Recenziju putem AI-a</h2>\n            <p class=\"text-muted\">Napi+Ūi +Ūto misli+Ū o knjizi, AI ¶Áe automatski parsirati ocjenu i sentimen.</p>\n\n            <form id=\"aiForm\">\n                <div class=\"form-group mb-3\">\n                    <label for=\"prompt\" class=\"form-label\">+Što misli+Ū o knjizi?</label>\n                    <textarea class=\"form-control\" id=\"prompt\" rows=\"5\" \n                        placeholder=\"Primjer: Hobbit je odli¶Źan! Preporuka da, ocjena 5, fantasy je super!\"></textarea>\n                </div>\n\n                <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-primary\">≠Ť‹« Kreiraj putem AI-a</button>\n            </form>\n\n            <div id=\"result\" class=\"mt-4\"></div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n</div>\n\n<script>\ndocument.getElementById('aiForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    const prompt = document.getElementById('prompt').value;\n    const resultDiv = document.getElementById('result');\n\n    resultDiv.innerHTML = '‘∆- ¶Óekam AI odgovor...';\n\n    try {\n        const response = await fetch('/reviews/create-from-ai', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({ prompt })\n        });\n\n        const data = await response.json();\n\n        if (response.ok) {\n            resultDiv.innerHTML = `\n                <div class=\"alert alert-success\">\n                    <h5>‘Ěý ${data.message}</h5>\n                    <p><strong>Knjiga:</strong> ${data.review.bookTitle}</p>\n                    <p><strong>Ocjena:</strong> ${data.review.score}/5 ‘ļ…</p>\n                    <p><strong>Sentiment:</strong> ${data.review.sentiment}</p>\n                    <p><strong>Komentar:</strong> ${data.review.comment}</p>\n                </div>\n            `;\n        } else {\n            resultDiv.innerHTML = `\n                <div class=\"alert alert-danger\">\n                    <h5>‘£Ó Gre+Ūka</h5>\n                    <p>${data.error}</p>\n                    ${data.suggestion ? `<p>${data.suggestion}</p>` : ''}\n                </div>\n            `;\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        resultDiv.innerHTML = `<div class=\"alert alert-danger\">Gre+Ūka: ${error.message}</div>`;\n    }\n});\n</script>\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 8: Dodaj Link u Navigation**\n\n**Otvori:** `ispit/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`\n\n**U nav listi dodaj:**\n```html\n<li>\n    <a class=\"nav-link\" asp-controller=\"Reviews\" asp-action=\"CreateFromAI\">≠Ť•ĺ AI Recenzija</a>\n</li>\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 9: Testiranje**\n\n**Pokreni aplikaciju:**\n```bash\ndotnet run --project ispit/Lab5.csproj\n```\n\n**Testiraj:**\n```\n1. Otvori https://localhost:7003\n2. Klikni \"AI Recenzija\" (trebalo bi biti u navigaciji)\n3. Napi+Ūi: \"Harry Potter je fantastic! Ocjena 5, obavezna preporuka, fantasy best!\"\n4. Klikni \"Kreiraj putem AI-a\"\n5. Trebao bi vidjeti: ‘Ěý Recenzija kreirana za 'Harry Potter'\n```\n\n**+Što ¶Áe biti rezultat:**\n```\n‘Ěý Recenzija kreirana za 'Harry Potter'\nKnjiga: Harry Potter\nOcjena: 5/5 ‘ļ…\nSentiment: Positive\nKomentar: fantasy best!\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 10: Dodaj Logging**\n\n**U AIService i ReviewsController trebaju biti logovi (vidi TASK 1)**\n\n```csharp\n_logger.LogInformation(\"≠Ť•ĺ AI: Parsiranje promptja: {Prompt}\", prompt);\n_logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý Recenzija kreirana kroz AI: {BookTitle}\", book.Title);\n_logger.LogError(ex, \"‘£Ó Gre+Ūka pri AI kreiranju recenzije\");\n```\n\n---\n\n### ≠ŤŰ£ KAKO OBJASNITI (10 minuta)\n\n**Odgovor na pitanje: \"Kako funkcionira AI integracija?\"**\n\n```\n\"Implementirao sam AI integraciju +Ūto omogu¶Áava korisniku da kreira \nrecenziju prirodnom jezikom. Koristi se Claude API od Anthropica.\n\nARHITEKTURA:\n1. Korisnik napi+Ūe: \"Hobbit je odli¶Źan, ocjena 5\"\n2. Klikne dugme \"Kreiraj putem AI-a\"\n3. Prompt se po+Ūalje na Claude API (preko interneta)\n4. Claude parsira tekst i vra¶Áa JSON:\n   {\n     \"bookTitle\": \"Hobbit\",\n     \"score\": 5,\n     \"sentiment\": \"Positive\",\n     \"comment\": \"Hobbit je odli¶Źan\"\n   }\n5. Aplikacija prima JSON\n6. Pronalazi 'Hobbit' u bazi\n7. Kreira novu Review u bazi s tom ocjenom\n8. Vra¶Áa odgovor korisniku: ‘Ěý Recenzija kreirana\n\nTEHNI¶ÓKI DETALJI:\n- AIService se registrira u DI container-u\n- ReviewsController injektira IAIService\n- POST /reviews/create-from-ai endpoint\n- Koristi Anthropic.Sdk biblioteku\n- API key je sigurno pohranjen u user-secrets\n\nSIGURNOST:\n- API key nikad nije u kodu\n- Korisnik ne vidi API key\n- Sve je enkriptirano\n\nZA+ŠTO:\n- Korisnik ne treb+Ū znati strukturu podataka\n- Prirodniji unos podataka\n- LLM razumije context (ako ka+Ņe 'odli¶Źan' -> 5 zvjezdica)\n- Scalable - mogu dodati vi+Ūe primjera za AI\"\n```\n\n---\n\n### ‘Ěý CHECKLIST\n\n- [ ] Dobio Claude API Key\n- [ ] Dodao Anthropic.Sdk NuGet\n- [ ] Spremiio API Key u user-secrets\n- [ ] Kreirio AIService klasu\n- [ ] Registrirao u Program.cs\n- [ ] Dodao AI endpoint TESTOVI (3 + 3 EXTRA BODA) - OPCIONO ALI PREPORU¶ÓENO\n\n### ≠ŤńĽ Cilj\n- Automatski end-to-end testovi koji simuliraju korisnika\n- Testira cijeli flow (kreiraj ‘śŚ uredi ‘śŚ obri+Ūi)\n- Kriterij: \"Kreiranje testova za sve API endpointe (Playwright scenarij 10 koraka + 3 extra boda)\"\n\n### ‘∆-ī™∆ Vrijeme\n- **Implementacija:** 2-3 sata\n- **Testiranje:** 1 sat\n- **Objasniti:** 10 minuta\n\n### ≠ŤŲě SVEKORACI\n\n#### **KORAK 1: Dodaj Playwright**\n\n**U Package Manager Console:**\n```powershell\nInstall-Package Microsoft.Playwright\n```\n\n**Ili u .csproj:**\n```xml\n<PackageReference Include=\"Microsoft.Playwright\" Version=\"1.40.0\" />\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 2: Kreiraj Playwright Test File**\n\n**Kreiraj:** `ispit/Tests/PlaywrightTests.cs`\n\n```csharp\nusing Microsoft.Playwright;\nusing Xunit;\n\nnamespace Lab5.Tests;\n\npublic class PlaywrightTests : IAsyncLifetime\n{\n    private IPlaywright _playwright;\n    private IBrowser _browser;\n    private IPage _page;\n    private const string BaseUrl = \"https://localhost:7003\";\n\n    public async Task InitializeAsync()\n    {\n        _playwright = await Playwright.CreateAsync();\n        _browser = await _playwright.Chromium.LaunchAsync(new()\n        {\n            Headless = true,\n        });\n        _page = await _browser.CreatePageAsync();\n\n        // Ignoriraj SSL certifikat (localhost)\n        await _page.Context.ClearAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task DisposeAsync()\n    {\n        await _browser?.CloseAsync();\n        _playwright?.Dispose();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenarioPregledKnjiga_TrebaUcitatiSve()\n    {\n        // Scenario 1: Pregledaj sve knjige\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/books\");\n        \n        var title = await _page.TitleAsync();\n        Assert.NotNull(title);\n        \n        var books = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"[data-book-id]\");\n        Assert.NotEmpty(books);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosAutora_TrebaUcitatiSve()\n    {\n        // Scenario 2: Pregledaj sve autore\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/authors\");\n        \n        var authors = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"[data-author-id]\");\n        Assert.NotEmpty(authors);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosDetaljiKnjige_TrebaOtvoriti()\n    {\n        // Scenario 3: Otvori detalje knjige\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/books\");\n        \n        var firstBookLink = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"a[href*='/books/']\");\n        if (firstBookLink != null)\n        {\n            await firstBookLink.ClickAsync();\n            await _page.WaitForLoadStateAsync();\n            \n            var header = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"h1\");\n            Assert.NotNull(header);\n        }\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosPretraga_TrebaPronaciKnjige()\n    {\n        // Scenario 4: Pretra+Ņi knjige\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/books\");\n        \n        var searchInput = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"input[type='search']\");\n        if (searchInput != null)\n        {\n            await searchInput.FillAsync(\"Harry\");\n            await _page.WaitForLoadStateAsync();\n            \n            var results = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"[data-book-id]\");\n            Assert.NotEmpty(results);\n        }\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosNavigacija_TrebaSePreklapati()\n    {\n        // Scenario 5: Klikni kroz sve glavne linkove\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/\");\n        \n        var navLinks = new[] { \"books\", \"authors\", \"genres\", \"publishers\", \"reviews\" };\n        \n        foreach (var link in navLinks)\n        {\n            var navLink = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync($\"a:has-text('{link}')\");\n            if (navLink != null)\n            {\n                await navLink.ClickAsync();\n                await _page.WaitForLoadStateAsync();\n                \n                var content = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"main\");\n                Assert.NotNull(content);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosResponsivni_Dizajn()\n    {\n        // Scenario 6: Testiraj responsive na mobilnom\n        await _page.SetViewportSizeAsync(375, 667); // iPhone veli¶Źina\n        \n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/books\");\n        \n        var mainContent = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"main\");\n        var box = await mainContent.BoundingBoxAsync();\n        \n        Assert.NotNull(box);\n        Assert.True(box.Width <= 400, \"Trebalo bi biti responsive\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenarioFiltriranje_ZanroviSveOpcije()\n    {\n        // Scenario 7: Filtriranje po +Ņanrovima\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/genres\");\n        \n        var genreLinks = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"a[href*='/genres/']\");\n        Assert.NotEmpty(genreLinks);\n        \n        if (genreLinks.Count > 0)\n        {\n            await genreLinks[0].ClickAsync();\n            await _page.WaitForLoadStateAsync();\n            \n            var books = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"[data-book-id]\");\n            // Mogu biti 0 ili vi+Ūe\n            Assert.NotNull(books);\n        }\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosRecenzije_SveRecenzije()\n    {\n        // Scenario 8: Pregled svih recenzija\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/reviews\");\n        \n        var reviews = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"[data-review-id]\");\n        // Trebale bi biti bar neke\n        Assert.NotEmpty(reviews);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosKorisnici_SviKorisnici()\n    {\n        // Scenario 9: Pregled svih korisnika\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/users\");\n        \n        var users = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"[data-user-id]\");\n        Assert.NotEmpty(users);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ScenariosIzdavaci_SviIzdavaci()\n    {\n        // Scenario 10: Pregled svih izdava¶Źa\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/publishers\");\n        \n        var publishers = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"[data-publisher-id]\");\n        Assert.NotEmpty(publishers);\n    }\n\n    // EXTRA SCENARIJI (3 boda extra)\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ExtraScenarioHomePageStatistike()\n    {\n        // Extra 1: Provjera home page statistike\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/\");\n        \n        var stats = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"[data-stat]\");\n        Assert.NotNull(stats);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ExtraScenarioErrorHandling_InvalidId()\n    {\n        // Extra 2: Testiraj error stranicu (invalid ID)\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/books/99999\", new() { WaitUntil = WaitUntilState.NetworkIdle });\n        \n        // Trebala bi biti 404 ili error stranica\n        var notFound = await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"text='Not Found'\") \n                    ?? await _page.QuerySelectorAsync(\"text='Nije prona¶Ňeno'\");\n        \n        Assert.True(notFound != null || _page.Url.Contains(\"error\"), \n            \"Trebala bi biti error stranica\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task ExtraScenarioFullAccessibilityCheck()\n    {\n        // Extra 3: Accessibility check (nisu li svi linkovi broken)\n        await _page.GotoAsync($\"{BaseUrl}/\");\n        \n        var brokenLinks = 0;\n        var links = await _page.QuerySelectorAllAsync(\"a\");\n        \n        foreach (var link in links.Take(10)) // Testiraj prvih 10\n        {\n            var href = await link.GetAttributeAsync(\"href\");\n            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(href) || href.Contains(\"javascript\"))\n                brokenLinks++;\n        }\n        \n        Assert.Equal(0, brokenLinks);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **KORAK 3: Testiraj Playwright**\n\n```bash\ncd ispit\ndotnet test --filter \"PlaywrightTests\"\n```\n\n**Trebalo bi vidjeti:**\n```\nTest Run summary\n  Passed ‘ĚŰ 13\n  Failed ‘ĚĆ 0\n  Duration: ~30 sekundi\n```\n\n---\n\n### ≠ŤŰ£ KAKO OBJASNITI (10 minuta)\n\n```\n\"Kreirio sam Playwright testove koji simuliraju pravo korisnika.\n\nKAKO FUNKCIONIRA:\n1. Playwright je browser automation alat\n2. Kreiram test koji otvora stranicu\n3. Klikne na linkove, popuni forme, itd.\n4. Provjeravamo je li se ne+Ūto dogodilo\n\nPRIMJER TESTA:\n- Otvori /books stranicu\n- ¶Óekaj da se u¶Źita\n- Provjeri jesu li se knjige u¶Źitale\n- Klikni na prvu knjiga\n- Provjeri je li stranica otvorena\n\nSCENARIJI (10+):\n1. Pregledaj sve knjige\n2. Pregledaj sve autore\n3. Otvori detalje knjige\n4. Pretra+Ņi knjige\n5. Klikni kroz navigaciju\n6. Testiraj responsive (mobilna veli¶Źina)\n7. Filtriranje po +Ņanrovima\n8. Pregled recenzija\n9. Pregled korisnika\n10. Pregled izdava¶Źa\n\nEXTRA (3 boda):\n11. Home page statistike\n12. Error handling (invalid ID)\n13. Accessibility - provjera linkova\n\nZA+ŠTO:\n- End-to-end testovi testiraju +Ūto korisnik stvarno radi\n- Sigurniji nego unit testovi\n- Otkrivaju probleme +Ūto xUnit ne¶Áe\n- Provjera UI-a, ne samo logike\"\n```\n\n---\n\n### ‘Ěý CHECKLIST\n\n- [ ] Dodao Microsoft.Playwright paket\n- [ ] Kreirio PlaywrightTests.cs\n- [ ] 10 osnovnih testova\n- [ ] 3 extra testa\n- [ ] Sve testove prolaze ‘Ěý\n\n**Rezultat: +3 BODA (+3 extra = +6 BODOVA TOTAL!)** ‘Ěý\n\n---\n\n---\n\n## OPCIONO: ZADATAK 5 - GLOBAL SEARCH POBOLJ+ŠANJE (+1 BOD)\n\n### ≠ŤńĽ Cilj\n- Pretraga kroz sve entitete, ne samo knjige\n- Jedan search box koji pretra+Ņi sve\n\n### ‘∆-ī™∆ Vrijeme: 1 sat\n### ≠ŤŲě KAKO:\n\n**Kreiraj:** `ispit/Services/GlobalSearchService.cs`\n\n```csharp\nnamespace Lab5.Services;\n\npublic interface IGlobalSearchService\n{\n    Task<GlobalSearchResults> SearchAllAsync(string query);\n}\n\npublic class GlobalSearchService : IGlobalSearchService\n{\n    private readonly IBookRepository _bookRepository;\n    private readonly IAuthorRepository _authorRepository;\n    private readonly IGenreRepository _genreRepository;\n    private readonly IPublisherRepository _publisherRepository;\n\n    public GlobalSearchService(\n        IBookRepository bookRepository,\n        IAuthorRepository authorRepository,\n        IGenreRepository genreRepository,\n        IPublisherRepository publisherRepository)\n    {\n        _bookRepository = bookRepository;\n        _authorRepository = authorRepository;\n        _genreRepository = genreRepository;\n        _publisherRepository = publisherRepository;\n    }\n\n    public async Task<GlobalSearchResults> SearchAllAsync(string query)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query)) query = \"\";\n\n        var books = (await _bookRepository.GetAllAsync())\n            .Where(b => b.Title.Contains(query, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n            .Take(5);\n\n        var authors = (await _authorRepository.GetAllAsync())\n            .Where(a => $\"{a.FirstName} {a.LastName}\".Contains(query, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n            .Take(5);\n\n        var genres = (await _genreRepository.GetAllAsync())\n            .Where(g => g.Name.Contains(query, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n            .Take(5);\n\n        var publishers = (await _publisherRepository.GetAllAsync())\n            .Where(p => p.Name.Contains(query, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n            .Take(5);\n\n        return new GlobalSearchResults\n        {\n            Books = books.ToList(),\n            Authors = authors.ToList(),\n            Genres = genres.ToList(),\n            Publishers = publishers.ToList()\n        };\n    }\n}\n\npublic class GlobalSearchResults\n{\n    public List<Book> Books { get; set; } = new();\n    public List<Author> Authors { get; set; } = new();\n    public List<Genre> Genres { get; set; } = new();\n    public List<Publisher> Publishers { get; set; } = new();\n}\n```\n\n**Endpoint:**\n```csharp\n// U HomeController ili novom SearchController\n[AllowAnonymous]\n[Route(\"search\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> GlobalSearch(string q)\n{\n    var results = await _globalSearchService.SearchAllAsync(q);\n    return View(results);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n---\n\n# ≠ŤŰ’ FINALNI SA+ĮETAK - SVI {"session_id":"ae1ea9cc-49dd-44ce-8cf0-e3dfaa7daa0e","transcript_path":"C:\\Users\\Mihael\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-Mihael-Desktop-ASP-NET\\ae1ea9cc-49dd-44ce-8cf0-e3dfaa7daa0e.jsonl","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET","prompt_id":"3b495955-98c5-4000-abef-ce1333e905c1","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\ispit\\Services\\AIService.cs","content":"using System.Text.Json;\n\nnamespace Lab5.Services;\n\npublic class AIService : IAIService\n{\n    private readonly string _apiKey;\n    private readonly ILogger<AIService> _logger;\n\n    public AIService(string apiKey, ILogger<AIService> logger)\n    {\n        _apiKey = apiKey;\n        _logger = logger;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Ekstrahira podatke recenzije iz teksta upita.\n    /// Za sada koristi dummy implementaciju - trebat ¶Áe Claude API key\n    /// </summary>\n    public async Task<ReviewData> ExtractReviewFromPromptAsync(string prompt)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"≠Ť•ĺ AI: Parsiranje promptja: {Prompt}\", prompt);\n\n            // Dummy implementacija - parsira o¶Źite znakove iz teksta\n            var reviewData = ParseReviewFromText(prompt);\n\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý AI: Uspje+Ūno parsirano - {BookTitle}, Ocjena: {Score}\",\n                reviewData.BookTitle, reviewData.Score);\n\n            return await Task.FromResult(reviewData);\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            _logger.LogError(ex, \"‘£Ó AI Gre+Ūka pri parsiranju\");\n            throw;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Ekstrahira podatke knjige iz teksta upita.\n    /// Za sada koristi dummy implementaciju - trebat ¶Áe Claude API key\n    /// </summary>\n    public async Task<BookData> ExtractBookFromPromptAsync(string prompt)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"≠Ť•ĺ AI: Parsiranje knjige iz promptja: {Prompt}\", prompt);\n\n            var bookData = ParseBookFromText(prompt);\n\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"‘Ěý AI: Knjiga parsirana - {Title}, Autor: {Author}\",\n                bookData.Title, bookData.AuthorName);\n\n            return await Task.FromResult(bookData);\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            _logger.LogError(ex, \"‘£Ó AI Gre+Ūka pri parsiranju knjige\");\n            throw;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Dummy parser - izvla¶Źi informacije iz teksta na osnovu klju¶Źnih rije¶Źi\n    /// NAPOMENA: Ovo ¶Áe biti zamijenjeno s Claude API-jem kada se vrati API key\n    /// </summary>\n    private ReviewData ParseReviewFromText(string text)\n    {\n        var data = new ReviewData();\n\n        text = text.ToLower();\n\n        // Ekstrahiraj naslov knjige - o¶Źekuje format: \"Knjiga: XYZ\" ili samo prvi dio\n        if (text.Contains(\"za \"))\n        {\n            var parts = text.Split(\" za \");\n            if (parts.Length > 1)\n            {\n                data.BookTitle = ExtractBookName(parts[1]);\n            }\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            data.BookTitle = ExtractFirstNoun(text);\n        }\n\n        // Ekstrahiraj ocjenu (1-5)\n        data.Score = ExtractScore(text);\n\n        // Ekstrahiraj sentiment\n        data.Sentiment = ExtractSentiment(text);\n\n        // Preporuka\n        data.IsRecommended = text.Contains(\"preporuka\") ||\n                           text.Contains(\"preporu¶Źujem\") ||\n                           text.Contains(\"odli¶Źan\") ||\n                           text.Contains(\"fantasti¶Źan\") ||\n                           data.Score >= 4;\n\n        // Komentar - uzmi prvi dio teksta\n        data.Comment = text.Length > 200 ? text.Substring(0, 197) + \"...\" : text;\n\n        return data;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Dummy parser za knjige\n    /// </summary>\n    private BookData ParseBookFromText(string text)\n    {\n        var data = new BookData();\n\n        text = text.ToLower();\n\n        // Ekstrahiraj naslov\n        data.Title = ExtractFirstNoun(text);\n\n        // Ekstrahiraj autora\n        if (text.Contains(\"autor:\") || text.Contains(\"od \"))\n        {\n            var parts = text.Split(\" od \");\n            if (parts.Length > 1)\n            {\n                data.AuthorName = ExtractAuthorName(parts[1]);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Ekstrahiraj ISBN\n        data.ISBN = ExtractISBN(text) ?? \"000-0000000000\";\n\n        // Ekstrahiraj broj stranica\n        data.PageCount = ExtractPageCount(text);\n\n        data.Language = \"eng\";\n\n        return data;\n    }\n\n    private string ExtractBookName(string text)\n    {\n        var words = text.Split(' ');\n        var name = string.Join(\" \", words.Take(Math.Min(4, words.Length)));\n        return name.Trim(',', '.', '!', '?').ToTitleCase();\n    }\n\n    private string ExtractFirstNoun(string text)\n    {\n        var words = text.Split(new[] { \" \", \",\", \".\", \"!\", \"?\" }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);\n        var noun = words.FirstOrDefault(w => w.Length > 2 && !IsCommonWord(w)) ?? words.FirstOrDefault() ?? \"Unknown\";\n        return noun.ToTitleCase();\n    }\n\n    private string ExtractAuthorName(string text)\n    {\n        var parts = text.Split(new[] { \" \", \",\", \".\" }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);\n        return string.Join(\" \", parts.Take(2)).ToTitleCase();\n    }\n\n    private string? ExtractISBN(string text)\n    {\n        var pattern = @\"\\d{3}-\\d{10}|\\d{10}\";\n        var match = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Match(text, pattern);\n        return match.Success ? match.Value : null;\n    }\n\n    private int ExtractScore(string text)\n    {\n        // Tra+Ņi brojeve 1-5\n        foreach (var match in System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Matches(text, @\"\\b[1-5]\\b\"))\n        {\n            if (int.TryParse(match.Value, out int score))\n                return score;\n        }\n\n        // Infer iz sentimenta\n        if (text.Contains(\"odli¶Źan\") || text.Contains(\"fantasti¶Źan\") || text.Contains(\"super\"))\n            return 5;\n        if (text.Contains(\"dobar\") || text.Contains(\"solidan\"))\n            return 4;\n        if (text.Contains(\"ok\") || text.Contains(\"zadovoljava\"))\n            return 3;\n        if (text.Contains(\"lo+Ū\") || text.Contains(\"razo¶Źaran\"))\n            return 2;\n        if (text.Contains(\"teribilan\") || text.Contains(\"grozno\"))\n            return 1;\n\n        return 3; // Default\n    }\n\n    private string ExtractSentiment(string text)\n    {\n        if (text.Contains(\"odli¶Źan\") || text.Contains(\"fantasti¶Źan\") ||\n            text.Contains(\"super\") || text.Contains(\"amazing\"))\n            return \"Enthusiastic\";\n\n        if (text.Contains(\"dobar\") || text.Contains(\"svi¶Ňa\") || text.Contains(\"solidan\"))\n            return \"Positive\";\n\n        if (text.Contains(\"lo+Ū\") || text.Contains(\"razo¶Źaran\") || text.Contains(\"nema\"))\n            return \"Critical\";\n\n        return \"Neutral\";\n    }\n\n    private int ExtractPageCount(string text)\n    {\n        var matches = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Matches(text, @\"\\b\\d{2,4}\\b\");\n        foreach (var match in matches.Cast<System.Text.RegularExpressions.Match>())\n        {\n            if (int.TryParse(match.Value, out int pages) && pages > 50 && pages < 10000)\n                return pages;\n        }\n        return 300; // Default\n    }\n\n    private bool IsCommonWord(string word)\n    {\n        var common = new[] { \"the\", \"a\", \"an\", \"and\", \"or\", \"but\", \"in\", \"on\", \"at\", \"je\", \"je\", \"je\" };\n        return common.Contains(word);\n    }\n}\n\npublic static class StringExtensions\n{\n    public static string ToTitleCase(this string text)\n    {\n        return System.Globalization.CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.TextInfo.ToTitleCase(text.ToLower());\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WnFfgTn81oTf3wiYqrzU25"}
